-    res.status(500).json({
-      status: "error",
-      message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
-    });
-  }
-});
-
-app.get("/api/v1/tools", async (req, res) => {
-  const limit = normalizeLimit(req.query.limit, 20, 200);
-  const runId = normalizeString(req.query.runId);
-  const sourceId = normalizeString(req.query.sourceId);
-  const jobId = normalizeString(req.query.jobId);
-  const query = buildToolsListQuery({ limit, runId, sourceId, jobId });
-  const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
-  res.json({ items: rows.rows, count: rows.rowCount });
-});
-
-app.get("/api/v1/tasks", async (req, res) => {
-  const limit = normalizeLimit(req.query.limit, 20, 200);
-  const runId = normalizeString(req.query.runId);
-  const sourceId = normalizeString(req.query.sourceId);
-  const jobId = normalizeString(req.query.jobId);
-  const status = normalizeString(req.query.status);
-  const query = buildTasksListQuery({ limit, runId, sourceId, jobId, status });
-  const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
-  res.json({ items: rows.rows, count: rows.rowCount });
-});
-
-app.get("/api/v1/metrics", async (_req, res) => {
-  const metrics = await loadPipelineMetrics(pg, redis, config);
-  res.json(metrics);
-});
-
-app.get("/api/v1/source-sites", async (_req, res) => {
-  const rows = await pg.query(
-    `SELECT id, name, base_url, enabled, meta, updated_at
-     FROM source_sites
-     ORDER BY id ASC`
+const defaultConfig = getPlatformConfig();
+const VALID_TASK_STATUSES = new Set(Object.values(TASK_STATUS));
+
+export function createApp(options = {}) {
+  const config = options.config ?? defaultConfig;
+  const pg = options.pg ?? createPgPool(config.db);
+  const redis = options.redis ?? createRedisClient(config.redis);
+  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
+  const loadSeedPlanImpl = options.loadSeedPlanImpl ?? loadSeedPlan;
+  const collectRunSourceIdsImpl = options.collectRunSourceIdsImpl ?? collectRunSourceIds;
+  const preparePipelineRunImpl = options.preparePipelineRunImpl ?? preparePipelineRun;
+  const resetPipelineSourcesImpl = options.resetPipelineSourcesImpl ?? resetPipelineSources;
+  const enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl = options.enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl ?? enqueueDiscoveryBatch;
+  const enqueueSeedBatchImpl = options.enqueueSeedBatchImpl ?? enqueueSeedBatch;
+  const loadPipelineMetricsImpl = options.loadPipelineMetricsImpl ?? loadPipelineMetrics;
+
+  const app = express();
+  app.use(express.json({ limit: "256kb" }));
+
+  app.get(
+    "/healthz",
+    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
+      await pg.query("SELECT 1");
+      res.status(200).json({ status: "ok", service: serviceName });
+    })
   );
-  res.json({ items: rows.rows, count: rows.rowCount });
-});
-
-app.get("/api/v1/exports/tools.csv", async (req, res) => {
-  const limit = normalizeLimit(req.query.limit, 1000, 5000);
-  const sourceId = normalizeString(req.query.sourceId);
-  const runId = normalizeString(req.query.runId);
-  const jobId = normalizeString(req.query.jobId);
-  const query = buildToolsExportQuery({
-    limit,
-    sourceId,
-    runId,
-    jobId,
-  });
 
-  const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
-  sendCsv(res, buildCsvFilename("tools", { sourceId, runId, jobId }), TOOL_EXPORT_COLUMNS, rows.rows);
-});
-
-app.get("/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv", async (req, res) => {
-  const limit = normalizeLimit(req.query.limit, 1000, 5000);
-  const sourceId = normalizeString(req.query.sourceId);
-  const runId = normalizeString(req.query.runId);
-  const jobId = normalizeString(req.query.jobId);
-  const status = normalizeString(req.query.status);
-  const query = buildTasksExportQuery({
-    limit,
-    runId,
-    sourceId,
-    jobId,
-    status,
-  });
+  app.get(
+    "/api/v1/tools",
+    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
+      const filters = parseToolsListRequest(req.query);
+      const query = buildToolsListQuery(filters);
+      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
+      res.json(buildListResponse(rows.rows, filters));
+    })
+  );
 
-  const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
-  sendCsv(res, buildCsvFilename("tasks", { sourceId, runId, jobId, status }), TASK_EXPORT_COLUMNS, rows.rows);
-});
-
-app.post("/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run", async (req, res) => {
-  try {
-    const body = req.body && typeof req.body === "object" ? req.body : {};
-    const seedUrls = normalizeArray(body.seedUrls);
-    const sourceIds = normalizeArray(body.sourceIds);
-    const requestedBy = normalizeString(body.requestedBy) || "query-api";
-    const reason = normalizeString(body.reason) || "manual_trigger";
-    const sourceId = normalizeString(body.sourceId) || config.sourceId;
-    const runId = normalizeString(body.runId) || createId("run");
-    const runLabel = normalizeString(body.runLabel);
-    const coldStart = parseBool(body.coldStart, false);
-    const candidateLimitPerSource = normalizeLimit(body.candidateLimitPerSource, 0, 10000);
-    const discoveryPageLimit = normalizeLimit(body.discoveryPageLimit, 0, 1000);
-
-    const seedPlan = await loadSeedPlan({
-      seedUrls: seedUrls.length > 0 ? seedUrls : config.seedUrls,
-      sourceId,
-      sourceIds: sourceIds.length > 0 ? sourceIds : config.sourceIds,
-      sourceSitesConfigPath: config.sourceSitesConfigPath,
-    });
-    const runSourceIds = collectRunSourceIds(seedPlan, [sourceId]);
-    let reset = null;
-    if (coldStart) {
-      await preparePipelineRun(pg, {
-        sourceIds: runSourceIds,
-        runId,
-        requestedBy,
-        reason,
-        meta: {
-          coldStart: true,
-          runLabel: runLabel || null,
-        },
+  app.get(
+    "/api/v1/tasks",
+    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
+      const filters = parseTasksListRequest(req.query);
+      const query = buildTasksListQuery(filters);
+      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
+      res.json(buildListResponse(rows.rows, filters));
+    })
+  );
+
+  app.get(
+    "/api/v1/metrics",
+    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
+      const metrics = await loadPipelineMetricsImpl(pg, redis, config);
+      res.json(metrics);
+    })
+  );
+
+  app.get(
+    "/api/v1/source-sites",
+    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
+      const rows = await pg.query(
+        `SELECT id, name, base_url, enabled, meta, updated_at
+         FROM source_sites
+         ORDER BY id ASC`
+      );
+      res.json({ items: rows.rows, count: rows.rowCount });
+    })
+  );
+
+  app.get(
+    "/api/v1/exports/tools.csv",
+    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
+      const filters = parseToolsExportRequest(req.query);
+      const query = buildToolsExportQuery(filters);
+      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
+      sendCsv(
+        res,
+        buildCsvFilename("tools", {
+          sourceId: filters.sourceId,
+          runId: filters.runId,
+          jobId: filters.jobId,
+        }),
+        TOOL_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
+        rows.rows
+      );
+    })
+  );
+
+  app.get(
+    "/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv",
+    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
+      const filters = parseTasksExportRequest(req.query);
+      const query = buildTasksExportQuery(filters);
+      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
+      sendCsv(
+        res,
+        buildCsvFilename("tasks", {
+          sourceId: filters.sourceId,
+          runId: filters.runId,
+          jobId: filters.jobId,
+          status: filters.status,
+        }),
+        TASK_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
+        rows.rows
+      );
+    })
+  );
+
+  app.post(
+    "/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run",
+    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
+      const body = parseSeedRunRequest(req.body, config);
+      const seedPlan = await loadSeedPlanImpl({
+        seedUrls: body.seedUrls.length > 0 ? body.seedUrls : config.seedUrls,
+        sourceId: body.sourceId,
+        sourceIds: body.sourceIds.length > 0 ? body.sourceIds : config.sourceIds,
+        sourceSitesConfigPath: config.sourceSitesConfigPath,
+      });
+
+      const runSourceIds = collectRunSourceIdsImpl(seedPlan, [body.sourceId]);
+      let reset = null;
+      if (body.coldStart) {
+        await preparePipelineRunImpl(pg, {
+          sourceIds: runSourceIds,
+          runId: body.runId,
+          requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
+          reason: body.reason,
+          meta: {
+            coldStart: true,
+            runLabel: body.runLabel || null,
+          },
+        });
+        reset = await resetPipelineSourcesImpl(pg, redis, {
+          sourceIds: runSourceIds,
+          queues: config.queues,
+        });
+      }
+
+      const result =
+        seedPlan.sourceSites && seedPlan.sourceSites.length > 0
+          ? await enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
+              queues: config.queues,
+              workerName: serviceName,
+              requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
+              reason: body.reason,
+              runId: body.runId,
+              runLabel: body.runLabel,
+              coldStart: body.coldStart,
+              candidateLimitPerSource: body.candidateLimitPerSource ?? 0,
+              discoveryPageLimit: body.discoveryPageLimit ?? 0,
+            })
+          : await enqueueSeedBatchImpl(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
+              queues: config.queues,
+              workerName: serviceName,
+              requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
+              reason: body.reason,
+              runId: body.runId,
+              runLabel: body.runLabel,
+              coldStart: body.coldStart,
+            });
+
+      res.status(202).json({
+        accepted: true,
+        ...result,
+        runId: body.runId,
+        runLabel: body.runLabel || null,
+        coldStart: body.coldStart,
+        reset,
+        requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
+        reason: body.reason,
+        candidateLimitPerSource: body.candidateLimitPerSource,
+        discoveryPageLimit: body.discoveryPageLimit,
       });
-      reset = await resetPipelineSources(pg, redis, {
-        sourceIds: runSourceIds,
-        queues: config.queues,
+    })
+  );
+
+  app.use((error, _req, _res, next) => {
+    if (error instanceof SyntaxError && "body" in error) {
+      next(new ApiError(400, "invalid_json_body", "Request body must be valid JSON"));
+      return;
+    }
+    next(error);
+  });
+
+  app.use((error, req, res, _next) => {
+    const normalized = normalizeApiError(error);
+    if (normalized.statusCode >= 500) {
+      logImpl(serviceName, "error", "query-api request failed", {
+        path: req.path,
+        method: req.method,
+        error: normalized.message,
       });
     }
 
-    const result =
-      seedPlan.sourceSites && seedPlan.sourceSites.length > 0
-        ? await enqueueDiscoveryBatch(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
-            queues: config.queues,
-            workerName: serviceName,
-            requestedBy,
-            reason,
-            runId,
-            runLabel,
-            coldStart,
-            candidateLimitPerSource,
-            discoveryPageLimit,
-          })
-        : await enqueueSeedBatch(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
-            queues: config.queues,
-            workerName: serviceName,
-            requestedBy,
-            reason,
-            runId,
-            runLabel,
-            coldStart,
-          });
-
-    res.status(202).json({
-      accepted: true,
-      ...result,
-      runId,
-      runLabel: runLabel || null,
-      coldStart,
-      reset,
-      requestedBy,
-      reason,
-      candidateLimitPerSource: candidateLimitPerSource || null,
-      discoveryPageLimit: discoveryPageLimit || null,
-    });
-  } catch (error) {
-    res.status(500).json({
-      accepted: false,
-      message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
-    });
-  }
-});
+    const payload = {
+      error: {
+        code: normalized.code,
+        message: normalized.message,
+      },
+    };
+    if (normalized.details) {
+      payload.error.details = normalized.details;
+    }
+    if (req.path === "/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run") {
+      payload.accepted = false;
+    }
 
-async function main() {
+    res.status(normalized.statusCode).json(payload);
+  });
+
+  return { app, pg, redis, config, logImpl };
+}
+
+export async function main(options = {}) {
+  const runtime = createApp(options);
+  const { app, pg, redis, config, logImpl } = runtime;
   await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);
+
   const server = app.listen(config.queryApiPort, () => {
-    log(serviceName, "info", "query-api started", { port: config.queryApiPort });
+    logImpl(serviceName, "info", "query-api started", { port: config.queryApiPort });
   });
 
   const shutdown = async () => {
     server.close(async () => {
       await redis.quit();
       await pg.end();
       process.exit(0);
     });
   };
+
   process.on("SIGINT", shutdown);
   process.on("SIGTERM", shutdown);
 }
 
-main().catch((error) => {
-  log(serviceName, "error", "query-api crashed", {
-    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
-  });
-  process.exit(1);
-});
-
-function normalizeLimit(value, defaultValue, max) {
-  const n = Number(value);
-  if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0) return defaultValue;
-  return Math.min(Math.floor(n), max);
-}
-
-function normalizeArray(value) {
-  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
-    return value.map((item) => String(item).trim()).filter(Boolean);
-  }
-  if (typeof value === "string") {
-    return value
-      .split(",")
-      .map((item) => item.trim())
-      .filter(Boolean);
-  }
-  return [];
+function isMainModule(meta) {
+  const entry = process.argv[1];
+  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
 }
 
-function normalizeString(value) {
-  if (typeof value !== "string") return "";
-  return value.trim();
+if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
+  main().catch((error) => {
+    log(serviceName, "error", "query-api crashed", {
+      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
+    });
+    process.exit(1);
+  });
 }
 
-function buildToolsListQuery(filters) {
+export function buildToolsListQuery(filters) {
   const values = [];
   const conditions = [];
 
   if (filters.sourceId) {
     values.push(filters.sourceId);
     conditions.push(`g.source_id = $${values.length}`);
   }
   if (filters.runId) {
     values.push(filters.runId);
     conditions.push(`g.run_id = $${values.length}`);
   }
   if (filters.jobId) {
     values.push(filters.jobId);
     conditions.push(
       `EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM crawl_tasks t
          WHERE t.trace_id = g.trace_id
            AND t.job_id = $${values.length}
        )`
     );
   }
 
   values.push(filters.limit);
+  values.push(filters.offset);
   const where = conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" AND ")}` : "";
 
   return {
     text:
-      `SELECT id, run_id, canonical_url, title, summary, source_id, quality_score, trace_id, published_at, updated_at
+      `SELECT
+         g.id,
+         g.run_id,
+         g.canonical_url,
+         g.title,
+         g.summary,
+         g.source_id,
+         g.quality_score,
+         g.trace_id,
+         g.published_at,
+         g.updated_at,
+         COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count
        FROM gold_tool_entities g
        ${where}
-       ORDER BY published_at DESC
-       LIMIT $${values.length}`,
+       ORDER BY g.published_at DESC
+       LIMIT $${values.length - 1}
+       OFFSET $${values.length}`,
     values,
   };
 }
 
-function buildTasksListQuery(filters) {
+export function buildTasksListQuery(filters) {
   const values = [];
   const conditions = [];
 
   if (filters.runId) {
     values.push(filters.runId);
-    conditions.push(`run_id = $${values.length}`);
+    conditions.push(`t.run_id = $${values.length}`);
   }
   if (filters.jobId) {
     values.push(filters.jobId);
-    conditions.push(`job_id = $${values.length}`);
+    conditions.push(`t.job_id = $${values.length}`);
   }
   if (filters.sourceId) {
     values.push(filters.sourceId);
-    conditions.push(`source_id = $${values.length}`);
+    conditions.push(`t.source_id = $${values.length}`);
   }
   if (filters.status) {
     values.push(filters.status);
-    conditions.push(`status = $${values.length}`);
+    conditions.push(`t.status = $${values.length}`);
   }
 
   values.push(filters.limit);
+  values.push(filters.offset);
   const where = conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" AND ")}` : "";
 
   return {
     text:
-      `SELECT run_id, id, job_id, trace_id, source_id, url, final_url, fetch_channel, decoded_charset, stage, status, http_status, error, published, created_at, updated_at
-       FROM crawl_tasks
+      `SELECT
+         t.run_id,
+         t.id,
+         t.job_id,
+         t.trace_id,
+         t.source_id,
+         t.url,
+         t.final_url,
+         t.fetch_channel,
+         t.decoded_charset,
+         t.stage,
+         t.status,
+         t.http_status,
+         t.error,
+         t.published,
+         t.created_at,
+         t.updated_at,
+         COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count
+       FROM crawl_tasks t
        ${where}
-       ORDER BY created_at DESC
-       LIMIT $${values.length}`,
+       ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
+       LIMIT $${values.length - 1}
+       OFFSET $${values.length}`,
     values,
   };
 }
+
+function asyncHandler(fn) {
+  return (req, res, next) => Promise.resolve(fn(req, res, next)).catch(next);
+}
+
+function parseToolsListRequest(query) {
+  const pagination = parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit: 20, maxLimit: 200 });
+  return {
+    ...pagination,
+    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
+    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
+    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
+  };
+}
+
+function parseTasksListRequest(query) {
+  const pagination = parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit: 20, maxLimit: 200 });
+  const status = readOptionalQueryString(query.status, "status");
+  if (status && !VALID_TASK_STATUSES.has(status)) {
+    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_query_parameter", "Query parameter status is invalid", {
+      field: "status",
+      allowed: [...VALID_TASK_STATUSES],
+    });
+  }
+  return {
+    ...pagination,
+    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
+    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
+    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
+    status,
+  };
+}
+
+function parseToolsExportRequest(query) {
+  return {
+    limit: parseBoundedInteger(query.limit, "limit", { defaultValue: 1000, min: 1, max: 5000 }),
+    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, …1945 tokens truncated…}
+
+class ApiError extends Error {
+  constructor(statusCode, code, message, details = null) {
+    super(message);
+    this.statusCode = statusCode;
+    this.code = code;
+    this.details = details;
+  }
+}
diff --git a/services/query-api/src/metrics.mjs b/services/query-api/src/metrics.mjs
index d6e9412..9e732d3 100644
--- a/services/query-api/src/metrics.mjs
+++ b/services/query-api/src/metrics.mjs
@@ -1,100 +1,117 @@
 export async function loadPipelineMetrics(pg, redis, config) {
   const [taskAgg, jobAgg, discoveryDepth, fetchDepth, normalizeDepth, qualityDepth, publishDepth] =
     await Promise.all([
       pg.query(
         `SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS total_tasks,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'published') AS published_tasks,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'quality_rejected') AS quality_rejected_tasks,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'fetch_failed') AS fetch_failed_tasks,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued_fetch') AS queued_fetch_tasks,
+           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued_normalize') AS queued_normalize_tasks,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued_quality') AS queued_quality_tasks,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued_publish') AS queued_publish_tasks,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'fetching') AS fetching_tasks,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (
              WHERE status = 'fetching'
                AND COALESCE(
                  fetch_lease_expires_at,
                  updated_at + ($1::bigint * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')
                ) < NOW()
            ) AS stale_fetching_tasks,
            COALESCE(
              EXTRACT(
                EPOCH FROM (
                  NOW() - MIN(
                    CASE
                      WHEN status = 'queued_fetch' THEN COALESCE(last_fetch_enqueue_at, created_at)
                      ELSE NULL
                    END
                  )
                )
              ),
              0
            )::bigint AS oldest_queued_fetch_age_seconds
          FROM crawl_tasks`,
         [config.fetchStaleAfterMs]
       ),
       pg.query(
         `SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS total_jobs,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'discovering') AS discovering_jobs,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued') AS queued_jobs,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completed') AS completed_jobs
          FROM crawl_jobs`
       ),
       redis.llen(config.queues.discovery),
       redis.llen(config.queues.fetch),
       redis.llen(config.queues.normalize),
       redis.llen(config.queues.quality),
       redis.llen(config.queues.publish),
     ]);
 
   return formatPipelineMetrics({
     taskAgg: taskAgg.rows[0] ?? {},
     jobAgg: jobAgg.rows[0] ?? {},
     queueDepths: {
       discovery: discoveryDepth,
       fetch: fetchDepth,
       normalize: normalizeDepth,
       quality: qualityDepth,
       publish: publishDepth,
     },
   });
 }
 
 export function formatPipelineMetrics({ taskAgg = {}, jobAgg = {}, queueDepths = {} }) {
   const published = toNumber(taskAgg.published_tasks);
   const rejected = toNumber(taskAgg.quality_rejected_tasks);
   const attempts = published + rejected;
   const publishPassRate = attempts > 0 ? Number((published / attempts).toFixed(4)) : 0;
+  const queuedFetchTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.queued_fetch_tasks);
+  const queuedNormalizeTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.queued_normalize_tasks);
+  const queuedQualityTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.queued_quality_tasks);
+  const queuedPublishTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.queued_publish_tasks);
+  const fetchingTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.fetching_tasks);
+  const normalizedQueueDepths = {
+    discovery: toNumber(queueDepths.discovery),
+    fetch: toNumber(queueDepths.fetch),
+    normalize: toNumber(queueDepths.normalize),
+    quality: toNumber(queueDepths.quality),
+    publish: toNumber(queueDepths.publish),
+  };
 
   return {
     totalTasks: toNumber(taskAgg.total_tasks),
     publishedTasks: published,
     qualityRejectedTasks: rejected,
     fetchFailedTasks: toNumber(taskAgg.fetch_failed_tasks),
-    queuedFetchTasks: toNumber(taskAgg.queued_fetch_tasks),
-    queuedQualityTasks: toNumber(taskAgg.queued_quality_tasks),
-    queuedPublishTasks: toNumber(taskAgg.queued_publish_tasks),
-    fetchingTasks: toNumber(taskAgg.fetching_tasks),
+    queuedFetchTasks,
+    queuedNormalizeTasks,
+    queuedQualityTasks,
+    queuedPublishTasks,
+    fetchingTasks,
+    activeTaskBacklog: queuedFetchTasks + queuedNormalizeTasks + queuedQualityTasks + queuedPublishTasks + fetchingTasks,
     staleFetchingTasks: toNumber(taskAgg.stale_fetching_tasks),
     oldestQueuedFetchAgeSeconds: toNumber(taskAgg.oldest_queued_fetch_age_seconds),
     publishPassRate,
     totalJobs: toNumber(jobAgg.total_jobs),
     discoveringJobs: toNumber(jobAgg.discovering_jobs),
     queuedJobs: toNumber(jobAgg.queued_jobs),
     completedJobs: toNumber(jobAgg.completed_jobs),
     queueDepths: {
-      discovery: toNumber(queueDepths.discovery),
-      fetch: toNumber(queueDepths.fetch),
-      normalize: toNumber(queueDepths.normalize),
-      quality: toNumber(queueDepths.quality),
-      publish: toNumber(queueDepths.publish),
+      ...normalizedQueueDepths,
+      total:
+        normalizedQueueDepths.discovery +
+        normalizedQueueDepths.fetch +
+        normalizedQueueDepths.normalize +
+        normalizedQueueDepths.quality +
+        normalizedQueueDepths.publish,
     },
   };
 }
 
 function toNumber(value) {
   const n = Number(value);
   return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0;
 }
diff --git a/services/query-api/tests/http.test.mjs b/services/query-api/tests/http.test.mjs
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..857d2e3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/services/query-api/tests/http.test.mjs
@@ -0,0 +1,341 @@
+import assert from "node:assert/strict";
+import { once } from "node:events";
+import test from "node:test";
+import { createApp } from "../src/index.mjs";
+
+const testConfig = {
+  sourceId: "plan0-seed",
+  sourceIds: ["futurepedia", "toolify"],
+  seedUrls: [],
+  sourceSitesConfigPath: "/tmp/source-sites.json",
+  fetchStaleAfterMs: 600000,
+  queues: {
+    discovery: "papaweb:queue:discovery",
+    fetch: "papaweb:queue:fetch",
+    normalize: "papaweb:queue:normalize",
+    quality: "papaweb:queue:quality",
+    publish: "papaweb:queue:publish",
+  },
+};
+
+test("healthz returns ok when the database probe succeeds", async () => {
+  await withTestServer(
+    {
+      pg: {
+        async query(sql) {
+          assert.match(String(sql), /SELECT 1/);
+          return { rowCount: 1, rows: [{ ok: 1 }] };
+        },
+      },
+    },
+    async ({ baseUrl }) => {
+      const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/healthz`);
+      const body = await response.json();
+
+      assert.equal(response.status, 200);
+      assert.deepEqual(body, {
+        status: "ok",
+        service: "query-api",
+      });
+    }
+  );
+});
+
+test("tools endpoint returns paginated items with total count and consistent filters", async () => {
+  await withTestServer(
+    {
+      pg: {
+        async query(sql, params = []) {
+          const statement = String(sql);
+          assert.match(statement, /COUNT\(\*\) OVER\(\) AS total_count/i);
+          assert.match(statement, /g\.source_id = \$1/i);
+          assert.match(statement, /g\.run_id = \$2/i);
+          assert.match(statement, /t\.job_id = \$3/i);
+          assert.match(statement, /LIMIT \$4/i);
+          assert.match(statement, /OFFSET \$5/i);
+          assert.deepEqual(params, ["futurepedia", "run-1", "job-1", 2, 2]);
+          return {
+            rowCount: 2,
+            rows: [
+              {
+                id: 11,
+                run_id: "run-1",
+                canonical_url: "https://example.com/tool-a",
+                title: "Tool A",
+                summary: "Summary A",
+                source_id: "futurepedia",
+                quality_score: "0.95",
+                trace_id: "trace-a",
+                published_at: "2026-03-17T00:00:00.000Z",
+                updated_at: "2026-03-17T00:01:00.000Z",
+                total_count: "5",
+              },
+              {
+                id: 12,
+                run_id: "run-1",
+                canonical_url: "https://example.com/tool-b",
+                title: "Tool B",
+                summary: "Summary B",
+                source_id: "futurepedia",
+                quality_score: "0.91",
+                trace_id: "trace-b",
+                published_at: "2026-03-17T00:02:00.000Z",
+                updated_at: "2026-03-17T00:03:00.000Z",
+                total_count: "5",
+              },
+            ],
+          };
+        },
+      },
+    },
+    async ({ baseUrl }) => {
+      const response = await fetch(
+        `${baseUrl}/api/v1/tools?sourceId=futurepedia&runId=run-1&jobId=job-1&limit=2&page=2`
+      );
+      const body = await response.json();
+
+      assert.equal(response.status, 200);
+      assert.equal(body.count, 2);
+      assert.equal(body.total, 5);
+      assert.equal(body.limit, 2);
+      assert.equal(body.offset, 2);
+      assert.equal(body.page, 2);
+      assert.equal("total_count" in body.items[0], false);
+    }
+  );
+});
+
+test("tasks endpoint rejects invalid status filters and conflicting pagination params", async () => {
+  await withTestServer(
+    {
+      pg: {
+        async query() {
+          throw new Error("should not query for invalid params");
+        },
+      },
+    },
+    async ({ baseUrl }) => {
+      const badStatus = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/v1/tasks?status=not-real`);
+      const badStatusBody = await badStatus.json();
+      assert.equal(badStatus.status, 400);
+      assert.equal(badStatusBody.error.code, "invalid_query_parameter");
+
+      const mixedPaging = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/v1/tasks?limit=10&page=2&offset=10`);
+      const mixedPagingBody = await mixedPaging.json();
+      assert.equal(mixedPaging.status, 400);
+      assert.match(mixedPagingBody.error.message, /offset and page cannot be used together/i);
+    }
+  );
+});
+
+test("tasks export endpoint applies the same filters and returns csv output", async () => {
+  await withTestServer(
+    {
+      pg: {
+        async query(sql, params = []) {
+          const statement = String(sql);
+          assert.match(statement, /FROM crawl_tasks t/i);
+          assert.match(statement, /t\.run_id = \$1/i);
+          assert.match(statement, /t\.source_id = \$2/i);
+          assert.match(statement, /t\.status = \$3/i);
+          assert.match(statement, /LIMIT \$4/i);
+          assert.deepEqual(params, ["run-1", "futurepedia", "published", 1]);
+          return {
+            rowCount: 1,
+            rows: [
+              {
+                job_id: "job-1",
+                task_id: "task-1",
+                trace_id: "trace-1",
+                source_id: "futurepedia",
+                request_url: "https://example.com/source",
+                final_url: "https://example.com/tool",
+                stage: "publish",
+                status: "published",
+                http_status: 200,
+                fetch_channel: "http",
+                decoded_charset: "utf-8",
+                error: "",
+                canonical_url: "https://example.com/tool",
+                normalized_title: "Example Tool",
+                normalized_summary: "Example Summary",
+                quality_score: "0.95",
+                quality_pass: "true",
+                policy_version: "plan0-v1",
+                published: true,
+                created_at: "2026-03-17 00:00:00+00",
+                updated_at: "2026-03-17 00:01:00+00",
+              },
+            ],
+          };
+        },
+      },
+    },
+    async ({ baseUrl }) => {
+      const response = await fetch(
+        `${baseUrl}/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv?runId=run-1&sourceId=futurepedia&status=published&limit=1`
+      );
+      const csv = await response.text();
+
+      assert.equal(response.status, 200);
+      assert.equal(response.headers.get("content-type"), "text/csv; charset=utf-8");
+      assert.match(response.headers.get("content-disposition") || "", /tasks-run-1-futurepedia-published\.csv/);
+      assert.match(csv, /^job_id,task_id,trace_id,source_id,/);
+      assert.match(csv, /task-1/);
+    }
+  );
+});
+
+test("seed-run returns a clear 400 when body fields are invalid", async () => {
+  await withTestServer(
+    {
+      pg: { async query() { return { rowCount: 0, rows: [] }; } },
+    },
+    async ({ baseUrl }) => {
+      const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`, {
+        method: "POST",
+        headers: {
+          "content-type": "application/json",
+        },
+        body: JSON.stringify({
+          coldStart: "maybe",
+          seedUrls: ["https://example.com"],
+        }),
+      });
+      const body = await response.json();
+
+      assert.equal(response.status, 400);
+      assert.equal(body.accepted, false);
+      assert.equal(body.error.code, "invalid_request_body");
+      assert.match(body.error.message, /coldStart/i);
+    }
+  );
+});
+
+test("seed-run can be triggered and then queried through tasks visibility", async () => {
+  const state = {
+    runId: "",
+  };
+
+  await withTestServer(
+    {
+      pg: {
+        async query(sql, params = []) {
+          const statement = String(sql);
+          if (statement.includes("FROM crawl_tasks")) {
+            assert.deepEqual(params, [state.runId, 20, 0]);
+            return {
+              rowCount: 1,
+              rows: [
+                {
+                  run_id: state.runId,
+                  id: "task-1",
+                  job_id: "job-1",
+                  trace_id: "trace-1",
+                  source_id: "futurepedia",
+                  url: "https://example.com/source",
+                  final_url: "https://example.com/tool",
+                  fetch_channel: "http",
+                  decoded_charset: "utf-8",
+                  stage: "fetch",
+                  status: "queued_fetch",
+                  http_status: null,
+                  error: null,
+                  published: false,
+                  created_at: "2026-03-17T00:00:00.000Z",
+                  updated_at: "2026-03-17T00:00:00.000Z",
+                  total_count: "1",
+                },
+              ],
+            };
+          }
+          throw new Error(`unexpected SQL: ${statement}`);
+        },
+      },
+      loadSeedPlanImpl: async () => ({
+        targets: [{ sourceId: "futurepedia", url: "https://example.com/source" }],
+        sourceSites: [],
+        mode: "explicit_urls",
+      }),
+      enqueueSeedBatchImpl: async (_pg, _redis, _seedPlan, options) => {
+        state.runId = options.runId;
+        return {
+          mode: "explicit_urls",
+          seedCount: 1,
+          requestedCount: 1,
+          createdCount: 1,
+          dedupedCount: 0,
+          jobId: "job-1",
+        };
+      },
+    },
+    async ({ baseUrl }) => {
+      const postResponse = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`, {
+        method: "POST",
+        headers: {
+          "content-type": "application/json",
+        },
+        body: JSON.stringify({
+          seedUrls: ["https://example.com/source"],
+          requestedBy: "tester",
+          reason: "manual",
+        }),
+      });
+      const accepted = await postResponse.json();
+
+      assert.equal(postResponse.status, 202);
+      assert.equal(accepted.accepted, true);
+      assert.equal(typeof accepted.runId, "string");
+      assert.match(accepted.runId, /^run_/);
+
+      const listResponse = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/v1/tasks?runId=${accepted.runId}`);
+      const listed = await listResponse.json();
+
+      assert.equal(listResponse.status, 200);
+      assert.equal(listed.total, 1);
+      assert.equal(listed.items[0].run_id, accepted.runId);
+      assert.equal(listed.items[0].status, "queued_fetch");
+    }
+  );
+});
+
+async function withTestServer(options, run) {
+  const { app } = createApp({
+    config: testConfig,
+    pg: options.pg ?? { async query() { return { rowCount: 0, rows: [] }; } },
+    redis:
+      options.redis ??
+      {
+        async llen() {
+          return 0;
+        },
+      },
+    loadSeedPlanImpl: options.loadSeedPlanImpl,
+    collectRunSourceIdsImpl: options.collectRunSourceIdsImpl,
+    preparePipelineRunImpl: options.preparePipelineRunImpl,
+    resetPipelineSourcesImpl: options.resetPipelineSourcesImpl,
+    enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl: options.enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl,
+    enqueueSeedBatchImpl: options.enqueueSeedBatchImpl,
+    loadPipelineMetricsImpl: options.loadPipelineMetricsImpl,
+    logImpl: () => {},
+  });
+
+  const server = app.listen(0, "127.0.0.1");
+  await once(server, "listening");
+  const address = server.address();
+  const baseUrl = `http://127.0.0.1:${address.port}`;
+
+  try {
+    await run({ baseUrl });
+  } finally {
+    await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
+      server.close((error) => {
+        if (error) {
+          reject(error);
+          return;
+        }
+        resolve();
+      });
+    });
+  }
+}
diff --git a/services/query-api/tests/metrics.test.mjs b/services/query-api/tests/metrics.test.mjs
index a0410bb..48a0764 100644
--- a/services/query-api/tests/metrics.test.mjs
+++ b/services/query-api/tests/metrics.test.mjs
@@ -1,80 +1,84 @@
 import assert from "node:assert/strict";
 import test from "node:test";
 import { loadPipelineMetrics } from "../src/metrics.mjs";
 
 test("loadPipelineMetrics exposes fetching backlog and stale age signals", async () => {
   const pgCalls = [];
   const queueDepths = new Map([
     ["papaweb:queue:discovery", 11],
     ["papaweb:queue:fetch", 7],
     ["papaweb:queue:normalize", 5],
     ["papaweb:queue:quality", 3],
     ["papaweb:queue:publish", 1],
   ]);
   const pg = {
     async query(sql, params = []) {
       pgCalls.push({ sql: String(sql), params });
       if (pgCalls.length === 1) {
         return {
           rowCount: 1,
           rows: [
             {
               total_tasks: "25",
               published_tasks: "10",
               quality_rejected_tasks: "2",
               fetch_failed_tasks: "4",
               queued_fetch_tasks: "6",
+              queued_normalize_tasks: "4",
               queued_quality_tasks: "1",
               queued_publish_tasks: "2",
               fetching_tasks: "3",
               stale_fetching_tasks: "1",
               oldest_queued_fetch_age_seconds: "7200",
             },
           ],
         };
       }
       return {
         rowCount: 1,
         rows: [
           {
             total_jobs: "5",
             discovering_jobs: "1",
             queued_jobs: "2",
             completed_jobs: "2",
           },
         ],
       };
     },
   };
   const redis = {
     async llen(queueName) {
       return queueDepths.get(queueName) ?? 0;
     },
   };
 
   const metrics = await loadPipelineMetrics(pg, redis, {
     fetchStaleAfterMs: 600000,
     queues: {
       discovery: "papaweb:queue:discovery",
       fetch: "papaweb:queue:fetch",
       normalize: "papaweb:queue:normalize",
       quality: "papaweb:queue:quality",
       publish: "papaweb:queue:publish",
     },
   });
 
   assert.equal(pgCalls.length, 2);
   assert.deepEqual(pgCalls[0].params, [600000]);
   assert.match(pgCalls[0].sql, /stale_fetching_tasks/i);
   assert.equal(metrics.fetchingTasks, 3);
+  assert.equal(metrics.queuedNormalizeTasks, 4);
+  assert.equal(metrics.activeTaskBacklog, 16);
   assert.equal(metrics.staleFetchingTasks, 1);
   assert.equal(metrics.oldestQueuedFetchAgeSeconds, 7200);
   assert.equal(metrics.publishPassRate, 0.8333);
   assert.deepEqual(metrics.queueDepths, {
     discovery: 11,
     fetch: 7,
     normalize: 5,
     quality: 3,
     publish: 1,
+    total: 27,
   });
 });
Tool Result #55 shell_command call_MoxB6WoNF3C8QfWXl2Uity8c exit 0 01:29:21
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: import process from "node:process"; import express from "express"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; import { TASK_STATUS } f...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
import process from "node:process";
import express from "express";
import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url";
import { TASK_STATUS } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import {
  collectRunSourceIds,
  createId,
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  enqueueDiscoveryBatch,
  enqueueSeedBatch,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  getPlatformConfig,
  loadSeedPlan,
  log,
  preparePipelineRun,
  resetPipelineSources,
} from "@papaweb/shared";
import {
  TASK_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
  TOOL_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
  buildCsvFilename,
  buildTasksExportQuery,
  buildToolsExportQuery,
  sendCsv,
} from "./csv-export.mjs";
import { loadPipelineMetrics } from "./metrics.mjs";

const serviceName = "query-api";
const defaultConfig = getPlatformConfig();
const VALID_TASK_STATUSES = new Set(Object.values(TASK_STATUS));

export function createApp(options = {}) {
  const config = options.config ?? defaultConfig;
  const pg = options.pg ?? createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = options.redis ?? createRedisClient(config.redis);
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const loadSeedPlanImpl = options.loadSeedPlanImpl ?? loadSeedPlan;
  const collectRunSourceIdsImpl = options.collectRunSourceIdsImpl ?? collectRunSourceIds;
  const preparePipelineRunImpl = options.preparePipelineRunImpl ?? preparePipelineRun;
  const resetPipelineSourcesImpl = options.resetPipelineSourcesImpl ?? resetPipelineSources;
  const enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl = options.enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl ?? enqueueDiscoveryBatch;
  const enqueueSeedBatchImpl = options.enqueueSeedBatchImpl ?? enqueueSeedBatch;
  const loadPipelineMetricsImpl = options.loadPipelineMetricsImpl ?? loadPipelineMetrics;

  const app = express();
  app.use(express.json({ limit: "256kb" }));

  app.get(
    "/healthz",
    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
      await pg.query("SELECT 1");
      res.status(200).json({ status: "ok", service: serviceName });
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/tools",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseToolsListRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildToolsListQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      res.json(buildListResponse(rows.rows, filters));
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/tasks",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseTasksListRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildTasksListQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      res.json(buildListResponse(rows.rows, filters));
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/metrics",
    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
      const metrics = await loadPipelineMetricsImpl(pg, redis, config);
      res.json(metrics);
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/source-sites",
    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
      const rows = await pg.query(
        `SELECT id, name, base_url, enabled, meta, updated_at
         FROM source_sites
         ORDER BY id ASC`
      );
      res.json({ items: rows.rows, count: rows.rowCount });
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/exports/tools.csv",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseToolsExportRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildToolsExportQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      sendCsv(
        res,
        buildCsvFilename("tools", {
          sourceId: filters.sourceId,
          runId: filters.runId,
          jobId: filters.jobId,
        }),
        TOOL_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
        rows.rows
      );
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseTasksExportRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildTasksExportQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      sendCsv(
        res,
        buildCsvFilename("tasks", {
          sourceId: filters.sourceId,
          runId: filters.runId,
          jobId: filters.jobId,
          status: filters.status,
        }),
        TASK_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
        rows.rows
      );
    })
  );

  app.post(
    "/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const body = parseSeedRunRequest(req.body, config);
      const seedPlan = await loadSeedPlanImpl({
        seedUrls: body.seedUrls.length > 0 ? body.seedUrls : config.seedUrls,
        sourceId: body.sourceId,
        sourceIds: body.sourceIds.length > 0 ? body.sourceIds : config.sourceIds,
        sourceSitesConfigPath: config.sourceSitesConfigPath,
      });

      const runSourceIds = collectRunSourceIdsImpl(seedPlan, [body.sourceId]);
      let reset = null;
      if (body.coldStart) {
        await preparePipelineRunImpl(pg, {
          sourceIds: runSourceIds,
          runId: body.runId,
          requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
          reason: body.reason,
          meta: {
            coldStart: true,
            runLabel: body.runLabel || null,
          },
        });
        reset = await resetPipelineSourcesImpl(pg, redis, {
          sourceIds: runSourceIds,
          queues: config.queues,
        });
      }

      const result =
        seedPlan.sourceSites && seedPlan.sourceSites.length > 0
          ? await enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
              queues: config.queues,
              workerName: serviceName,
              requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
              reason: body.reason,
              runId: body.runId,
              runLabel: body.runLabel,
              coldStart: body.coldStart,
              candidateLimitPerSource: body.candidateLimitPerSource ?? 0,
              discoveryPageLimit: body.discoveryPageLimit ?? 0,
            })
          : await enqueueSeedBatchImpl(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
              queues: config.queues,
              workerName: serviceName,
              requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
              reason: body.reason,
              runId: body.runId,
              runLabel: body.runLabel,
              coldStart: body.coldStart,
            });

      res.status(202).json({
        accepted: true,
        ...result,
        runId: body.runId,
        runLabel: body.runLabel || null,
        coldStart: body.coldStart,
        reset,
        requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
        reason: body.reason,
        candidateLimitPerSource: body.candidateLimitPerSource,
        discoveryPageLimit: body.discoveryPageLimit,
      });
    })
  );

  app.use((error, _req, _res, next) => {
    if (error instanceof SyntaxError && "body" in error) {
      next(new ApiError(400, "invalid_json_body", "Request body must be valid JSON"));
      return;
    }
    next(error);
  });

  app.use((error, req, res, _next) => {
    const normalized = normalizeApiError(error);
    if (normalized.statusCode >= 500) {
      logImpl(serviceName, "error", "query-api request failed", {
        path: req.path,
        method: req.method,
        error: normalized.message,
      });
    }

    const payload = {
      error: {
        code: normalized.code,
        message: normalized.message,
      },
    };
    if (normalized.details) {
      payload.error.details = normalized.details;
    }
    if (req.path === "/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run") {
      payload.accepted = false;
    }

    res.status(normalized.statusCode).json(payload);
  });

  return { app, pg, redis, config, logImpl };
}

export async function main(options = {}) {
  const runtime = createApp(options);
  const { app, pg, redis, config, logImpl } = runtime;
  await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);

  const server = app.listen(config.queryApiPort, () => {
    logImpl(serviceName, "info", "query-api started", { port: config.queryApiPort });
  });

  const shutdown = async () => {
    server.close(async () => {
      await redis.quit();
      await pg.end();
      process.exit(0);
    });
  };

  process.on("SIGINT", shutdown);
  process.on("SIGTERM", shutdown);
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "query-api crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}

export function buildToolsListQuery(filters) {
  const values = [];
  const conditions = [];

  if (filters.sourceId) {
    values.push(filters.sourceId);
    conditions.push(`g.source_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.runId) {
    values.push(filters.runId);
    conditions.push(`g.run_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.jobId) {
    values.push(filters.jobId);
    conditions.push(
      `EXISTS (
         SELECT 1
         FROM crawl_tasks t
         WHERE t.trace_id = g.trace_id
           AND t.job_id = $${values.length}
       )`
    );
  }

  values.push(filters.limit);
  values.push(filters.offset);
  const where = conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" AND ")}` : "";

  return {
    text:
      `SELECT
         g.id,
         g.run_id,
         g.canonical_url,
         g.title,
         g.summary,
         g.source_id,
         g.quality_score,
         g.trace_id,
         g.published_at,
         g.updated_at,
         COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count
       FROM gold_tool_entities g
       ${where}
       ORDER BY g.published_at DESC
       LIMIT $${values.length - 1}
       OFFSET $${values.length}`,
    values,
  };
}

export function buildTasksListQuery(filters) {
  const values = [];
  const conditions = [];

  if (filters.runId) {
    values.push(filters.runId);
    conditions.push(`t.run_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.jobId) {
    values.push(filters.jobId);
    conditions.push(`t.job_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.sourceId) {
    values.push(filters.sourceId);
    conditions.push(`t.source_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.status) {
    values.push(filters.status);
    conditions.push(`t.status = $${values.length}`);
  }

  values.push(filters.limit);
  values.push(filters.offset);
  const where = conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" AND ")}` : "";

  return {
    text:
      `SELECT
         t.run_id,
         t.id,
         t.job_id,
         t.trace_id,
         t.source_id,
         t.url,
         t.final_url,
         t.fetch_channel,
         t.decoded_charset,
         t.stage,
         t.status,
         t.http_status,
         t.error,
         t.published,
         t.created_at,
         t.updated_at,
         COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count
       FROM crawl_tasks t
       ${where}
       ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
       LIMIT $${values.length - 1}
       OFFSET $${values.length}`,
    values,
  };
}

function asyncHandler(fn) {
  return (req, res, next) => Promise.resolve(fn(req, res, next)).catch(next);
}

function parseToolsListRequest(query) {
  const pagination = parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit: 20, maxLimit: 200 });
  return {
    ...pagination,
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
  };
}

function parseTasksListRequest(query) {
  const pagination = parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit: 20, maxLimit: 200 });
  const status = readOptionalQueryString(query.status, "status");
  if (status && !VALID_TASK_STATUSES.has(status)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_query_parameter", "Query parameter status is invalid", {
      field: "status",
      allowed: [...VALID_TASK_STATUSES],
    });
  }
  return {
    ...pagination,
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
    status,
  };
}

function parseToolsExportRequest(query) {
  return {
    limit: parseBoundedInteger(query.limit, "limit", { defaultValue: 1000, min: 1, max: 5000 }),
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
  };
}

function parseTasksExportRequest(query) {
  const status = readOptionalQueryString(query.status, "status");
  if (status && !VALID_TASK_STATUSES.has(status)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_query_parameter", "Query parameter status is invalid", {
      field: "status",
      allowed: [...VALID_TASK_STATUSES],
    });
  }
  return {
    limit: parseBoundedInteger(query.limit, "limit", { defaultValue: 1000, min: 1, max: 5000 }),
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
    status,
  };
}

function parseSeedRunRequest(body, config) {
  if (!body || typeof body !== "object" || Array.isArray(body)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", "Request body must be a JSON object");
  }

  const seedUrls = readOptionalStringList(body.seedUrls, "seedUrls");
  const sourceIds = readOptionalStringList(body.sourceIds, "sourceIds");
  const requestedBy = readOptionalBodyString(body.requestedBy, "requestedBy") || "query-api";
  const reason = readOptionalBodyString(body.reason, "reason") || "manual_trigger";
  const sourceId = readOptionalBodyString(body.sourceId, "sourceId") || config.sourceId;
  const runId = readOptionalBodyString(body.runId, "runId") || createId("run");
  const runLabel = readOptionalBodyString(body.runLabel, "runLabel");
  const coldStart = parseStrictBoolean(body.coldStart, "coldStart", false);
  const candidateLimitPerSource = parseOptionalBoundedInteger(body.candidateLimitPerSource, "candidateLimitPerSource", {
    min: 1,
    max: 10000,
    errorCode: "invalid_request_body",
  });
  const discoveryPageLimit = parseOptionalBoundedInteger(body.discoveryPageLimit, "discoveryPageLimit", {
    min: 1,
    max: 1000,
    errorCode: "invalid_request_body",
  });

  return {
    seedUrls,
    sourceIds,
    requestedBy,
    reason,
    sourceId,
    runId,
    runLabel,
    coldStart,
    candidateLimitPerSource,
    discoveryPageLimit,
  };
}

function parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit, maxLimit }) {
  const limit = parseBoundedInteger(query.limit, "limit", {
    defaultValue: defaultLimit,
    min: 1,
    max: maxLimit,
  });
  const hasOffset = query.offset !== undefined;
  const hasPage = query.page !== undefined;
  if (hasOffset && hasPage) {
    throw new ApiError(
      400,
      "invalid_query_parameter",
      "Query parameters offset and page cannot be used together",
      { fields: ["offset", "page"] }
    );
  }

  if (hasOffset) {
    const offset = parseBoundedInteger(query.offset, "offset", {
      defaultValue: 0,
      min: 0,
      max: Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER,
    });
    return {
      limit,
      offset,
      page: Math.floor(offset / Math.max(limit, 1)) + 1,
    };
  }

  const page = parseBoundedInteger(query.page, "page", {
    defaultValue: 1,
    min: 1,
    max: Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER,
  });
  return {
    limit,
    offset: (page - 1) * limit,
    page,
  };
}

function buildListResponse(rows, filters) {
  const total = rows.length > 0 ? toNumber(rows[0].total_count) : 0;
  const items = rows.map((row) => {
    const next = { ...row };
    delete next.total_count;
    return next;
  });
  return {
    items,
    count: items.length,
    total,
    limit: filters.limit,
    offset: filters.offset,
    page: filters.page,
  };
}

function readOptionalQueryString(value, fieldName) {
  if (value === undefined) return "";
  return readOptionalString(value, fieldName, "query");
}

function readOptionalBodyString(value, fieldName) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null) return "";
  return readOptionalString(value, fieldName, "body");
}

function readOptionalString(value, fieldName, location) {
  const errorCode = location === "body" ? "invalid_request_body" : "invalid_query_parameter";
  if (Array.isArray(value) || (value && typeof value === "object")) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `${capitalize(location)} field ${fieldName} must be a string`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  const text = String(value).trim();
  if (!text) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `${capitalize(location)} field ${fieldName} must not be empty`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  return text;
}

function readOptionalStringList(value, fieldName) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null) return [];

  let items = [];
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    items = value.map((item) => {
      if (typeof item !== "string") {
        throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must contain only strings`, {
          field: fieldName,
        });
      }
      return item.trim();
    });
  } else if (typeof value === "string") {
    items = value.split(",").map((item) => item.trim());
  } else {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must be a string or string array`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }

  const normalized = items.filter(Boolean);
  if (normalized.length === 0) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must include at least one value`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  return normalized;
}

function parseStrictBoolean(value, fieldName, defaultValue) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") {
    return defaultValue;
  }
  if (typeof value === "boolean") {
    return value;
  }

  const normalized = String(value).trim().toLowerCase();
  if (["1", "true", "yes", "y", "on"].includes(normalized)) return true;
  if (["0", "false", "no", "n", "off"].includes(normalized)) return false;
  throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must be a boolean`, {
    field: fieldName,
  });
}

function parseOptionalBoundedInteger(value, fieldName, { min, max, errorCode }) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") {
    return null;
  }
  return parseBoundedInteger(value, fieldName, { min, max, errorCode });
}

function parseBoundedInteger(value, fieldName, { defaultValue = null, min, max, errorCode = "invalid_query_parameter" }) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") {
    if (defaultValue === null) {
      throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} is required`, {
        field: fieldName,
      });
    }
    return defaultValue;
  }
  if (Array.isArray(value) || (value && typeof value === "object")) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} must be an integer`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  const numeric = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isInteger(numeric)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} must be an integer`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  if (numeric < min || numeric > max) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} must be between ${min} and ${max}`, {
      field: fieldName,
      min,
      max,
    });
  }
  return numeric;
}

function normalizeApiError(error) {
  if (error instanceof ApiError) {
    return error;
  }
  return new ApiError(500, "internal_error", error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
}

function toNumber(value) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0;
}

function capitalize(value) {
  const text = String(value || "");
  return text.length > 0 ? `${text[0].toUpperCase()}${text.slice(1)}` : text;
}

class ApiError extends Error {
  constructor(statusCode, code, message, details = null) {
    super(message);
    this.statusCode = statusCode;
    this.code = code;
    this.details = details;
  }
}

Exit code: 0

Output:
import assert from "node:assert/strict";
import { once } from "node:events";
import test from "node:test";
import { createApp } from "../src/index.mjs";

const testConfig = {
  sourceId: "plan0-seed",
  sourceIds: ["futurepedia", "toolify"],
  seedUrls: [],
  sourceSitesConfigPath: "/tmp/source-sites.json",
  fetchStaleAfterMs: 600000,
  queues: {
    discovery: "papaweb:queue:discovery",
    fetch: "papaweb:queue:fetch",
    normalize: "papaweb:queue:normalize",
    quality: "papaweb:queue:quality",
    publish: "papaweb:queue:publish",
  },
};

test("healthz returns ok when the database probe succeeds", async () => {
  await withTestServer(
    {
      pg: {
        async query(sql) {
          assert.match(String(sql), /SELECT 1/);
          return { rowCount: 1, rows: [{ ok: 1 }] };
        },
      },
    },
    async ({ baseUrl }) => {
      const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/healthz`);
      const body = await response.json();

      assert.equal(response.status, 200);
      assert.deepEqual(body, {
        status: "ok",
        service: "query-api",
      });
    }
  );
});

test("tools endpoint returns paginated items with total count and consistent filters", async () => {
  await withTestServer(
    {
      pg: {
        async query(sql, params = []) {
          const statement = String(sql);
          assert.match(statement, /COUNT\(\*\) OVER\(\) AS total_count/i);
          assert.match(statement, /g\.source_id = \$1/i);
          assert.match(statement, /g\.run_id = \$2/i);
          assert.match(statement, /t\.job_id = \$3/i);
          assert.match(statement, /LIMIT \$4/i);
          assert.match(statement, /OFFSET \$5/i);
          assert.deepEqual(params, ["futurepedia", "run-1", "job-1", 2, 2]);
          return {
            rowCount: 2,
            rows: [
              {
                id: 11,
                run_id: "run-1",
                canonical_url: "https://example.com/tool-a",
                title: "Tool A",
                summary: "Summary A",
                source_id: "futurepedia",
                quality_score: "0.95",
                trace_id: "trace-a",
                published_at: "2026-03-17T00:00:00.000Z",
                updated_at: "2026-03-17T00:01:00.000Z",
                total_count: "5",
              },
              {
                id: 12,
                run_id: "run-1",
                canonical_url: "https://example.com/tool-b",
                title: "Tool B",
                summary: "Summary B",
                source_id: "futurepedia",
                quality_score: "0.91",
                trace_id: "trace-b",
                published_at: "2026-03-17T00:02:00.000Z",
                updated_at: "2026-03-17T00:03:00.000Z",
                total_count: "5",
              },
            ],
          };
        },
      },
    },
    async ({ baseUrl }) => {
      const response = await fetch(
        `${baseUrl}/api/v1/tools?sourceId=futurepedia&runId=run-1&jobId=job-1&limit=2&page=2`
      );
      const body = await response.json();

      assert.equal(response.status, 200);
      assert.equal(body.count, 2);
      assert.equal(body.total, 5);
      assert.equal(body.limit, 2);
      assert.equal(body.offset, 2);
      assert.equal(body.page, 2);
      assert.equal("total_count" in body.items[0], false);
    }
  );
});

test("tasks endpoint rejects invalid status filters and conflicting pagination params", async () => {
  await withTestServer(
    {
      pg: {
        async query() {
          throw new Error("should not query for invalid params");
        },
      },
    },
    async ({ baseUrl }) => {
      const badStatus = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/v1/tasks?status=not-real`);
      const badStatusBody = await badStatus.json();
      assert.equal(badStatus.status, 400);
      assert.equal(badStatusBody.error.code, "invalid_query_parameter");

      const mixedPaging = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/v1/tasks?limit=10&page=2&offset=10`);
      const mixedPagingBody = await mixedPaging.json();
      assert.equal(mixedPaging.status, 400);
      assert.match(mixedPagingBody.error.message, /offset and page cannot be used together/i);
    }
  );
});

test("tasks export endpoint applies the same filters and returns csv output", async () => {
  await withTestServer(
    {
      pg: {
        async query(sql, params = []) {
          const statement = String(sql);
          assert.match(statement, /FROM crawl_tasks t/i);
          assert.match(statement, /t\.run_id = \$1/i);
          assert.match(statement, /t\.source_id = \$2/i);
          assert.match(statement, /t\.status = \$3/i);
          assert.match(statement, /LIMIT \$4/i);
          assert.deepEqual(params, ["run-1", "futurepedia", "published", 1]);
          return {
            rowCount: 1,
            rows: [
              {
                job_id: "job-1",
                task_id: "task-1",
                trace_id: "trace-1",
                source_id: "futurepedia",
                request_url: "https://example.com/source",
                final_url: "https://example.com/tool",
                stage: "publish",
                status: "published",
                http_status: 200,
                fetch_channel: "http",
                decoded_charset: "utf-8",
                error: "",
                canonical_url: "https://example.com/tool",
                normalized_title: "Example Tool",
                normalized_summary: "Example Summary",
                quality_score: "0.95",
                quality_pass: "true",
                policy_version: "plan0-v1",
                published: true,
                created_at: "2026-03-17 00:00:00+00",
                updated_at: "2026-03-17 00:01:00+00",
              },
            ],
          };
        },
      },
    },
    async ({ baseUrl }) => {
      const response = await fetch(
        `${baseUrl}/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv?runId=run-1&sourceId=futurepedia&status=published&limit=1`
      );
      const csv = await response.text();

      assert.equal(response.status, 200);
      assert.equal(response.headers.get("content-type"), "text/csv; charset=utf-8");
      assert.match(response.headers.get("content-disposition") || "", /tasks-run-1-futurepedia-published\.csv/);
      assert.match(csv, /^job_id,task_id,trace_id,source_id,/);
      assert.match(csv, /task-1/);
    }
  );
});

test("seed-run returns a clear 400 when body fields are invalid", async () => {
  await withTestServer(
    {
      pg: { async query() { return { rowCount: 0, rows: [] }; } },
    },
    async ({ baseUrl }) => {
      const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: {
          "content-type": "application/json",
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          coldStart: "maybe",
          seedUrls: ["https://example.com"],
        }),
      });
      const body = await response.json();

      assert.equal(response.status, 400);
      assert.equal(body.accepted, false);
      assert.equal(body.error.code, "invalid_request_body");
      assert.match(body.error.message, /coldStart/i);
    }
  );
});

test("seed-run can be triggered and then queried through tasks visibility", async () => {
  const state = {
    runId: "",
  };

  await withTestServer(
    {
      pg: {
        async query(sql, params = []) {
          const statement = String(sql);
          if (statement.includes("FROM crawl_tasks")) {
            assert.deepEqual(params, [state.runId, 20, 0]);
            return {
              rowCount: 1,
              rows: [
                {
                  run_id: state.runId,
                  id: "task-1",
                  job_id: "job-1",
                  trace_id: "trace-1",
                  source_id: "futurepedia",
                  url: "https://example.com/source",
                  final_url: "https://example.com/tool",
                  fetch_channel: "http",
                  decoded_charset: "utf-8",
                  stage: "fetch",
                  status: "queued_fetch",
                  http_status: null,
                  error: null,
                  published: false,
                  created_at: "2026-03-17T00:00:00.000Z",
                  updated_at: "2026-03-17T00:00:00.000Z",
                  total_count: "1",
                },
              ],
            };
          }
          throw new Error(`unexpected SQL: ${statement}`);
        },
      },
      loadSeedPlanImpl: async () => ({
        targets: [{ sourceId: "futurepedia", url: "https://example.com/source" }],
        sourceSites: [],
        mode: "explicit_urls",
      }),
      enqueueSeedBatchImpl: async (_pg, _redis, _seedPlan, options) => {
        state.runId = options.runId;
        return {
          mode: "explicit_urls",
          seedCount: 1,
          requestedCount: 1,
          createdCount: 1,
          dedupedCount: 0,
          jobId: "job-1",
        };
      },
    },
    async ({ baseUrl }) => {
      const postResponse = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: {
          "content-type": "application/json",
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          seedUrls: ["https://example.com/source"],
          requestedBy: "tester",
          reason: "manual",
        }),
      });
      const accepted = await postResponse.json();

      assert.equal(postResponse.status, 202);
      assert.equal(accepted.accepted, true);
      assert.equal(typeof accepted.runId, "string");
      assert.match(accepted.runId, /^run_/);

      const listResponse = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/v1/tasks?runId=${accepted.runId}`);
      const listed = await listResponse.json();

      assert.equal(listResponse.status, 200);
      assert.equal(listed.total, 1);
      assert.equal(listed.items[0].run_id, accepted.runId);
      assert.equal(listed.items[0].status, "queued_fetch");
    }
  );
});

async function withTestServer(options, run) {
  const { app } = createApp({
    config: testConfig,
    pg: options.pg ?? { async query() { return { rowCount: 0, rows: [] }; } },
    redis:
      options.redis ??
      {
        async llen() {
          return 0;
        },
      },
    loadSeedPlanImpl: options.loadSeedPlanImpl,
    collectRunSourceIdsImpl: options.collectRunSourceIdsImpl,
    preparePipelineRunImpl: options.preparePipelineRunImpl,
    resetPipelineSourcesImpl: options.resetPipelineSourcesImpl,
    enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl: options.enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl,
    enqueueSeedBatchImpl: options.enqueueSeedBatchImpl,
    loadPipelineMetricsImpl: options.loadPipelineMetricsImpl,
    logImpl: () => {},
  });

  const server = app.listen(0, "127.0.0.1");
  await once(server, "listening");
  const address = server.address();
  const baseUrl = `http://127.0.0.1:${address.port}`;

  try {
    await run({ baseUrl });
  } finally {
    await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      server.close((error) => {
        if (error) {
          reject(error);
          return;
        }
        resolve();
      });
    });
  }
}

14-2. 每个 PR 合并前必须通过 `ci` 与 `e2e`。
15-3. 每个 PR 必须提交 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 证据。
16-4. 每个 PR 至少补 1 个单元测试；若变更影响主链路，必须同时补 1 个集成测试或扩展 1 条 E2E 断言。
17-5. 每个 PR 只解决一个明确问题，但可以跨 package/service 调整必要依赖面。
18:6. PR 描述必须包含：目的与范围、验收标准、测试证据、风险点、回滚方案。
19-
20-## 执行说明
21-
22-1. 先修可测试性，再补业务能力；避免核心逻辑仍然绑死在 `main()` 中导致后续 TDD 无法落地。
--
28-### PR-01：服务层可测试性重构与测试骨架
29-- 分支：`feature/pr-01-service-test-foundation`
30-- 范围：`services/worker-seed`、`services/query-api`、`services/worker-fetch-http`、`services/worker-normalize`、`services/worker-quality`、`services/publish_worker`、根 `package.json`
31-- 目的：先把主链路服务改造成“可测”，再谈后续 TDD 开发节奏
32:- 验收：
33-  - `worker-seed`、`worker-normalize`、`worker-quality`、`publish_worker` 拆出可直接测试的核心函数或 handler
34-  - 每个上述服务至少有 1 个可运行单测
35-  - 根 `npm run test:unit` 统一覆盖主链路服务，不再遗漏关键 workspace
36-  - 至少新增 1 条服务级集成烟测，验证主链路相邻阶段交接
37-- 测试：
38-  - `npm run test:unit`
39-  - `npm run test:e2e`
40-
41:### PR-02：contracts 强化与消息校验收口
42-- 分支：`feature/pr-02-contracts-hardening`
43-- 范围：`packages/contracts`，以及为接入新校验所必需的消费者调用点
44-- 目的：把队列消息从“只做字段存在校验”收紧为“按阶段消息结构校验”
45:- 验收：
46-  - 明确校验主链路消息必填字段：`traceId`、`jobId`、`taskId`、`sourceId`、`url`
47-  - 为不同阶段消息预留独立校验入口，避免消费者各自手写校验
48-  - 非法消息在进入业务逻辑前被拒绝，不产生副作用
49-- 测试：
--
55-### PR-03：seed 幂等与去重
56-- 分支：`feature/pr-03-seed-idempotency`
57-- 范围：`services/worker-seed`、`packages/shared`、必要时 `services/query-api` 的手动触发入口
58-- 目的：解决重复 seed、重复触发、重复入队问题
59:- 验收：
60-  - 同批 seed 不重复创建任务
61-  - 重复触发不会无限堆积相同 source/url 任务
62-  - `runId/sourceId/url` 维度的去重和重放语义明确
63-- 测试：
--
69-### PR-04：fetch 重试、降级与失败分类
70-- 分支：`feature/pr-04-fetch-retry-classify`
71-- 范围：`services/worker-fetch-http`、`packages/shared/src/platform-fetch.mjs`
72-- 目的：把 fetch 的真正重试与 fallback 逻辑收敛到正确边界
73:- 验收：
74-  - 明确区分超时、网络异常、HTTP 非 2xx、Pinchtab fallback 成功/失败
75-  - 重试次数和 fallback 触发条件可配置
76-  - 失败分类能稳定写入任务状态和事件日志
77-- 测试：
--
83-### PR-05：normalize 规则增强与 canonical 收口
84-- 分支：`feature/pr-05-normalize-rules`
85-- 范围：`services/worker-normalize`
86-- 目的：让标题、摘要、canonical URL 的生成变得稳定且可复现
87:- 验收：
88-  - 标题提取对空标题、异常 HTML、长标题有稳定行为
89-  - 摘要提取避免脚本/样式污染
90-  - `canonicalUrl` 的来源和回退规则清晰且可复现
91-- 测试：
--
97-### PR-06：policy-engine 规则扩展（冻结输出契约）
98-- 分支：`feature/pr-06-policy-engine-rules`
99-- 范围：`packages/policy-engine`
100-- 目的：扩质量规则，不在本 PR 改动 `evaluateQuality` 的输出结构
101:- 验收：
102-  - 评分理由细化到 `title/summary/httpStatus` 等维度
103-  - 阈值和边界条件可覆盖
104-  - 保持输出字段集合不变：`pass/score/reasons/policyVersion/threshold`
105-- 测试：
--
111-### PR-07：quality worker 与策略版本联动
112-- 分支：`feature/pr-07-quality-policy-link`
113-- 范围：`services/worker-quality`、`packages/shared`
114-- 目的：把策略加载、评分落库、拒绝原因追踪收口到 quality worker
115:- 验收：
116-  - 活跃策略加载正确
117-  - `quality_scores` 与 `crawl_tasks.quality` 保持一致
118-  - 未通过质量门禁的任务不会进入 publish 队列
119-  - 拒绝原因可追踪到策略版本
--
126-### PR-08：publish 幂等发布与作业收敛语义
127-- 分支：`feature/pr-08-publish-idempotent`
128-- 范围：`services/publish_worker`
129-- 目的：同时解决重复发布和 job 完成判定不清的问题
130:- 验收：
131-  - 相同 `canonical_url` 的重复发布不会产生脏写
132-  - 明确 job 终态语义：`published`、`fetch_failed`、`quality_rejected` 视为终态；仅存在非终态任务时禁止完成
133-  - `discovering` 阶段与普通 publish 完成条件边界清楚
134-- 测试：
--
136-  - 新增 1 条集成测试，验证混合状态任务下的 job 收敛
137-  - `npm run test:unit`
138-  - `npm run test:e2e`
139-
140:### PR-09：query-api 查询与运行控制补强
141-- 分支：`feature/pr-09-query-api-filters`
142-- 范围：`services/query-api`
143-- 目的：基于现有接口做一致性和可操作性补强，而不是重复建设已有能力
144:- 验收：
145-  - `/tools`、`/tasks`、导出接口的过滤参数和返回语义一致
146:  - 列表接口补齐分页/参数校验约束
147:  - `/pipeline/seed-run` 的请求参数校验和错误返回更清晰
148-  - `/metrics` 暴露的关键指标对主链路排障足够可用
149-- 测试：
150:  - API 单测覆盖健康检查、列表接口、导出接口、seed-run 参数校验
151-  - 新增 1 条 API 集成测试或 E2E 断言，验证从触发到查询的最小可见性
152-  - `npm run test:unit`
153-  - `npm run test:e2e`
154-
155-### PR-10：端到端回归与发布 Runbook
156-- 分支：`feature/pr-10-e2e-regression-runbook`
157-- 范围：`apps/crawler/tests`、`docs`、必要的运行脚本
158-- 目的：把前 9 个 PR 的能力收敛成一条可反复执行的回归链路
159:- 验收：
160-  - 新增或完善 1 条完整主链路 E2E：`seed -> fetch -> normalize -> quality -> publish -> query`
161-  - 文档补齐发布/回滚 Runbook
162-  - 失败定位入口、执行命令、恢复步骤可直接操作
163-- 测试：
--
169-1. `PR-01` 扩大到“可测试性重构 + 测试骨架”，因为当前多个 Worker 还不适合直接做 TDD。
170-2. `PR-04` 明确包含 `packages/shared/src/platform-fetch.mjs`，因为真正的重试与 fallback 逻辑在共享层。
171-3. `PR-06` 明确冻结 `policy-engine` 输出契约，避免和 `PR-07` 互相返工。
172-4. `PR-08` 增加 job 终态定义，避免“完成”语义在实现阶段反复变化。
173:5. `PR-09` 从“补基础过滤”调整为“查询与运行控制补强”，因为现有 Query API 已具备部分基础过滤能力。

Expand full message

结论很明确：

项目在做什么
- papaweb 是一个面向“工具导航网站”的采集/清洗/复盘闭环 Monorepo，Plan0 最小闭环里包含 crawler、多个 worker、Query API 和编排链路。见 [README.md#L3](D:/demo1/papaweb/README.md#L3)、[README.md#L12](D:/demo1/papaweb/README.md#L12)、[README.md#L14](D:/demo1/papaweb/README.md#L14)。

你现在所在分支
- 当前分支是 feature/pr-09-query-api-filters
- 相对 origin/dev：0 behind / 1 ahead
- 当前 HEAD 提交是 7833c5d feat(query-api): tighten filters and seed-run validation

这条分支正在完成什么
- 这条分支对应 PR-09，任务定义是“query-api 查询与运行控制补强”。见 [首批PR执行计划.md#L140](D:/demo1/papaweb/docs/首批PR执行计划.md#L140)。
- 目标包括：
- 统一 /tools、/tasks 和导出接口的过滤参数与返回语义 [首批PR执行计划.md#L145](D:/demo1/papaweb/docs/首批PR执行计划.md#L145)
- 给列表接口补齐分页和参数校验 [首批PR执行计划.md#L146](D:/demo1/papaweb/docs/首批PR执行计划.md#L146)
- 让 /pipeline/seed-run 的请求校验和报错更清晰 [首批PR执行计划.md#L147](D:/demo1/papaweb/docs/首批PR执行计划.md#L147)
- 让 /metrics 暴露更适合排障的关键指标 [首批PR执行计划.md#L148](D:/demo1/papaweb/docs/首批PR执行计划.md#L148)

从代码看，已经做到的内容
- Query API 已经被重构成可测试的 createApp 形式，并把 /tools、/tasks、/pipeline/seed-run 的请求解析、分页、错误处理收口了。见 [index.mjs#L33](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/index.mjs#L33)、[index.mjs#L58](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/index.mjs#L58)、[index.mjs#L68](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/index.mjs#L68)、[index.mjs#L137](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/index.mjs#L137)、[index.mjs#L395](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/index.mjs#L395)、[index.mjs#L439](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/index.mjs#L439)、[index.mjs#L477](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/index.mjs#L477)、[index.mjs#L519](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/index.mjs#L519)。
- /metrics 新增了 queuedNormalizeTasks、activeTaskBacklog 和总队列深度这类排障指标。见 [metrics.mjs#L1](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/metrics.mjs#L1)、[metrics.mjs#L66](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/metrics.mjs#L66)、[metrics.mjs#L94](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/metrics.mjs#L94)。

当前完成度判断
- 这条分支看起来已经不是“刚开始做”，而是“功能基本做完，进入可交付状态”。
- 我跑了 npm --workspace @papaweb/query-api test，结果 13/13 全通过。
- 测试覆盖点和 PR-09 目标是对齐的：分页过滤、非法参数、seed-run 校验、触发后可查询、metrics 指标。见 [http.test.mjs#L44](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/tests/http.test.mjs#L44)、[http.test.mjs#L108](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/tests/http.test.mjs#L108)、[http.test.mjs#L189](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/tests/http.test.mjs#L189)、[http.test.mjs#L215](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/tests/http.test.mjs#L215)、[metrics.test.mjs#L5](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/tests/metrics.test.mjs#L5)。
- 但我没有跑全仓 ci/e2e，所以按你们仓库规则，还不能仅凭这一点判断“可以合并”。

补充状态
- 工作区还有未跟踪内容：.claude/、data/、quality
- 没看到已跟踪文件的未提交修改，所以这条分支的核心实现大概率已经提交到了 HEAD

如果你要，我可以继续做两件事里的一个：
1. 帮你把这条分支相对 dev 的具体改动按接口拆开讲
2. 直接整理一份可用于 PR 的“目的 / 验收 / 测试证据 / 风险 / 回滚方案”

      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }

  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}
