# AGENTS.md

## 1) 鐩爣
鏈枃浠跺畾涔?`papaweb` 鍥㈤槦寮€鍙戝崗浣滆鍒欙紝閫傜敤浜庢湰鍦板洟闃熶笌鎵€鏈夎嚜鍔ㄥ寲浠ｇ悊銆?
## 2) 鍒嗘敮妯″瀷
- `main`锛氱敓浜?鍙戝竷鍒嗘敮锛屽彧鎺ユ敹缁忚繃楠岃瘉鐨勫彂甯冨彉鏇淬€?- `dev`锛氭棩甯搁泦鎴愬垎鏀紝鎵€鏈夊姛鑳藉厛鍚堝叆姝ゅ垎鏀€?- `feature/*`锛氭柊鍔熻兘鍒嗘敮锛屼粠 `dev` 鍒囧嚭锛屽悎鍥?`dev`銆?- `fix/*`锛氱己闄蜂慨澶嶅垎鏀紝浠?`dev` 鍒囧嚭锛屽悎鍥?`dev`銆?- `release/*`锛氬彂甯冨噯澶囧垎鏀紝浠?`dev` 鍒囧嚭锛涢獙璇侀€氳繃鍚?PR 鍚堝叆 `main`锛岄殢鍚庡洖鍚?`dev`銆?- `hotfix/*`锛氱嚎涓婄揣鎬ヤ慨澶嶅垎鏀紝浠?`main` 鍒囧嚭锛屽厛鍚堝叆 `main`锛屽啀鍥炲悎 `dev`銆?
## 3) 鎺ㄩ€佷笌 PR 瑙勫垯锛堝己绾︽潫锛?- 绂佹鐩存帴 push 鍒?`main`銆?- 绂佹鐩存帴 push 鍒?`dev`銆?- 鎵€鏈夋棩甯稿紑鍙戝彉鏇村繀椤婚€氳繃 PR 鍚堝叆 `dev`銆?- `main` 鍙厑璁告潵鑷?`release/*` 鎴?`hotfix/*` 鐨?PR銆?- 姣忎釜 PR 鑷冲皯 1 鍚?reviewer 瀹℃牳閫氳繃鍚庢墠鑳藉悎骞躲€?
## 4) CI / E2E 鍑嗗叆瑙勫垯
- PR 鍚堝苟鍒?`dev` 鍓嶏紝蹇呴』婊¤冻锛?- `ci` 妫€鏌ラ€氳繃锛堝崟鍏冩祴璇曘€侀潤鎬佹鏌ワ級銆?- `e2e` 妫€鏌ラ€氳繃锛堢鍒扮鍏抽敭璺緞锛夈€?- 浠讳竴妫€鏌ュけ璐ワ紝绂佹鍚堝苟銆?- 绂佹浠モ€滃厛鍚堝苟鍚庤ˉ娴嬧€濅负鐞嗙敱缁曡繃銆?
## 5) TDD锛堟祴璇曢┍鍔ㄥ紑鍙戯級瑙勫垯
- 蹇呴』鎵ц `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 涓夋锛?- `Red`锛氬厛鍐欐祴璇曞苟纭澶辫触銆?- `Green`锛氬啓鏈€灏忓疄鐜拌娴嬭瘯閫氳繃銆?- `Refactor`锛氶噸鏋勪唬鐮佸苟淇濇寔娴嬭瘯鎸佺画閫氳繃銆?- 淇 bug 鏃讹紝蹇呴』鍏堣ˉ鍥炲綊娴嬭瘯锛屽啀鏀逛笟鍔′唬鐮併€?- 鏂板鍔熻兘 PR锛岃嚦灏戝寘鍚細
- 1 涓崟鍏冩祴璇曘€?- 1 涓泦鎴愭祴璇曟垨 E2E 鐢ㄤ緥锛堣鐩栦富娴佺▼锛夈€?- 绂佹鍒犻櫎/璺宠繃娴嬭瘯鏉モ€滃噾缁跨伅鈥濄€?
## 6) PR 蹇呭～淇℃伅
- 鍙樻洿鐩殑涓庤寖鍥淬€?- 楠屾敹鏍囧噯锛堝彲瑙傚療缁撴灉锛夈€?- 娴嬭瘯璇佹嵁锛堟墽琛屽懡浠や笌缁撴灉锛夈€?- 椋庨櫓鐐逛笌鍥炴粴鏂规銆?- 鑻ュ奖鍝嶄娇鐢ㄦ柟寮忥紝闇€鍚屾鏇存柊鏂囨。銆?
## 7) 鍚堝苟绛栫暐
- 榛樿浣跨敤 `Squash merge`锛屼繚鎸佸巻鍙叉竻鏅般€?- Commit message 寤鸿浣跨敤 Conventional Commits锛堝 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`锛夈€?
## 8) 鏈湴闃叉姢寤鸿锛堝繀閰嶏級
- 鎵€鏈変汉鏈湴瀹夎 `pre-push` hook锛屾嫤鎴帹閫佸埌 `main`/`dev`銆?- 鎺ㄨ崘瑙勫垯锛氳嫢鐩爣鍒嗘敮鏄?`main` 鎴?`dev`锛岀洿鎺ユ嫆缁濆苟鎻愮ず璧?PR銆?
## 9) 绱ф€ヤ緥澶栨祦绋?- 浠?`hotfix/*` 鍙蛋绱ф€ユ祦绋嬨€?- 闇€鍦?PR 鎻忚堪涓啓鏄庡師鍥犮€侀闄┿€佸洖婊氭楠ゃ€?- 绱ф€ヤ慨澶嶅悎鍏?`main` 鍚庯紝蹇呴』鍦?24 灏忔椂鍐呭洖鍚堝埌 `dev` 骞惰ˉ榻愭祴璇曘€?

Output:
{"baseRefName":"dev","body":"## Purpose and Scope\n- Tighten `query-api` around filter consistency, pagination semantics, request validation, and testability instead of adding duplicate API surface.\n- Refactor the API entrypoint into a dependency-injectable app factory so HTTP behavior can be tested directly.\n- Improve `/metrics` with normalize backlog visibility and a total queue-depth summary for faster pipeline troubleshooting.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- `/tools`, `/tasks`, and export endpoints use the same filter names and return clearer list semantics with `limit`, `offset`, `page`, `count`, and `total`.\n- List pagination enforces explicit bounds and rejects conflicting/invalid parameters instead of silently coercing them.\n- `/pipeline/seed-run` validates request fields and returns clear `400` responses for invalid body input.\n- `/metrics` exposes enough backlog information to troubleshoot the main chain without guessing normalize-stage pressure from queue depth alone.\n\n## Test Evidence\n- `npm --workspace @papaweb/query-api test`\n- `npm run test:unit`\n- `npm run test:e2e`\n\n## Risks\n- Clients that relied on silent coercion of invalid `limit`, `page`, `offset`, or seed-run body fields will now receive `400` responses and need to correct the request.\n- `query-api` import behavior changed from immediate startup side effects to an explicit `main()` path; runtime is covered by unit and E2E, but this is still a structural change.\n\n## Rollback\n- Revert commit `7833c5d` from `dev`.\n- Re-run `npm run test:unit` and `npm run test:e2e` on the revert PR before merging.\n","headRefName":"feature/pr-09-query-api-filters","isDraft":false,"latestReviews":[],"mergeStateStatus":"CLEAN","number":18,"reviewDecision":"","statusCheckRollup":[{"__typename":"CheckRun","completedAt":"2026-03-17T07:55:10Z","conclusion":"SUCCESS","detailsUrl":"https://github.com/papaweb-org/papaweb/actions/runs/23184054051/job/67363137527","name":"ci","startedAt":"2026-03-17T07:54:47Z","status":"COMPLETED","workflowName":"ci"},{"__typename":"CheckRun","completedAt":"2026-03-17T08:01:44Z","conclusion":"SUCCESS","detailsUrl":"https://github.com/papaweb-org/papaweb/actions/runs/23184054036/job/67363137516","name":"e2e","startedAt":"2026-03-17T07:54:48Z","status":"COMPLETED","workflowName":"e2e"}],"title":"feat(query-api): tighten filters and seed-run validation"}

assistant #176 final_answer 02:13:49

结论
- 截至 2026-03-18，严格按你们仓库规则，这个 PR 还不该合并。
- 不是代码实现卡住，主要是流程门槛还差最后一步。

阻塞项
1. PR #18 还没有 reviewer approval。gh pr view 18 返回 latestReviews: []、reviewDecision: ""。而 [AGENTS.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/AGENTS.md) 明确要求每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。
2. 这次改动影响了 query-api 的请求校验、分页语义和错误返回，但分支里没有任何文档变更，只改了 [index.mjs](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/index.mjs)、[metrics.mjs](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/metrics.mjs) 和测试文件。按 [AGENTS.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/AGENTS.md)，“若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档”。这条我会视为待补。

已满足
- 分支目标正确：feature/pr-09-query-api-filters -> dev
- 远端 PR 已存在：#18
- isDraft = false
- mergeStateStatus = CLEAN
- GitHub checks 已通过：ci、e2e 都是 SUCCESS
- 本地 npm run test:unit 全通过
- PR 描述已经包含目的、验收、测试证据、风险和回滚

说明
- 我本地跑 npm run test:e2e 失败，是因为这台机器的 Docker 引擎没启动，不是代码失败。远端 GitHub 的 e2e 已通过，所以这不算当前 PR 的代码阻塞。
- 我没有发现新的代码级 blocker。

判断
- 严格按规则：现在还不能合并。
- 如果只看 GitHub 技术状态：已经接近可合并，只差 reviewer approval；再严一点，还应补文档。

1. 让 1 位 reviewer 审核通过 PR #18
2. 补一个最小文档更新，至少说明 /tools、/tasks 的分页语义，/pipeline/seed-run 的 400 校验行为，/metrics 新字段
3. 然后用 Squash merge 合到 dev

如果你要，我可以直接帮你起草这条 PR 需要补的文档内容。

2. 这次改动影响了 query-api 的请求校验、分页语义和错误返回，但分支里没有任何文档变更，只改了 [index.mjs](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/index.mjs)、[metrics.mjs](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/metrics.mjs) 和测试文件。按 [AGENTS.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/AGENTS.md)，“若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档”。这条我会视为待补。

- 如果只看 GitHub 技术状态：已经接近可合并，只差 reviewer approval；再严一点，还应补文档。

      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
# papaweb

面向“工具导航网站”场景的采集/清洗/复盘闭环 Monorepo。当前重点是 `apps/crawler`，调度用 Crawlab，渲染用 Pinchtab。

**核心入口**
- 采集入口：`apps/crawler/src/collect.mjs`
- Crawlab 调度入口：`apps/crawler/src/run-via-crawlab.mjs`
- 站点规则：`apps/crawler/config/source-sites.v1.json`
- 字段 schema：`apps/crawler/config/field-schema.v1.json`
- 源码部署：`infra/docker/`（Crawlab + Pinchtab 源码构建）

**Plan0 平台化最小闭环**
- Worker：`services/worker-seed`、`services/worker-fetch-http`、`services/worker-normalize`、`services/worker-quality`、`services/publish_worker`
- Query API：`services/query-api`
- Airflow DAG：`services/orchestrator-airflow/dags/papaweb_platform_seed_pipeline.py`
- 共享包：`packages/contracts`、`packages/policy-engine`、`packages/shared`
- Docker 分层：`infra/docker/compose.platform.yml`（通过 Stage D 启动）

**目录**
```text
.
apps/
  crawler/
    config/
    data/
    src/
    tests/
infra/
  docker/
docs/
  plan/
```

**Stage D 一键启动（平台闭环）**
```powershell
cd D:\demo1\papaweb\infra\docker
.\start.ps1 -Stage D -WithGrafana $true -Build
.\healthcheck.ps1 -Stage D -WithGrafana $true
.\platform-smoke.ps1 -TimeoutSec 300 -MinPublished 1
```

**方法一：本地 CLI 采集**
1. 安装 Node.js `>=18`。
2. 可选：启动 Crawlab + Pinchtab（需要渲染时再开）。
```powershell
cd D:\demo1\papaweb\infra\docker
.\bootstrap.ps1
```
```bash
docker compose up -d --build
```
3. 运行采集（示例：三站各 1000 条）。
```bash
node apps/crawler/src/collect.mjs --once --source futurepedia,toolify,ainav_cn --max-urls-per-source 1000 --revisit-hours 0 --pinchtab-url http://127.0.0.1:19867
```
4. 查看输出。
```text
apps/crawler/data/raw/<run_id>/
```

**方法二：Crawlab 调度采集**
1. 启动 Crawlab + Pinchtab（同上）。
2. 打开 Crawlab UI：`http://127.0.0.1:18080`（默认 `admin/admin`）。
3. 通过脚本自动创建项目/爬虫并触发任务。
```bash
node apps/crawler/src/run-via-crawlab.mjs
```
4. 覆盖采集参数（示例：三站各 1000 条，容器内 Pinchtab 地址为 `http://pinchtab:9867`）。
```bash
node apps/crawler/src/run-via-crawlab.mjs --command "node /workspace/apps/crawler/src/collect.mjs --once --source futurepedia,toolify,ainav_cn --max-urls-per-source 1000 --revisit-hours 0 --pinchtab-url http://pinchtab:9867 --pinchtab-token papaweb-local-token"
```
5. 如需自定义 token：修改 `infra/docker/docker-compose.yml` 的 `PINCHTAB_TOKEN`，并在命令里同步更新 `--pinchtab-token`。

**常用参数**
- `--pinchtab-url http://127.0.0.1:19867`
- `--pinchtab-mode always|fallback|disable`
- `--pinchtab-token <token>`（若 Pinchtab 开启了 auth）
- `--delay-min-ms 1200 --delay-max-ms 1800`
- `--max-failures 200 --max-consecutive-failures 20`
- `--source-concurrency 3`

**输出目录**
- 原始下载：`apps/crawler/data/raw/<run_id>/`
- 清洗结果：`apps/crawler/data/clean/<run_id>/`
- 复盘报告：`apps/crawler/data/review/<run_id>/`

**采集边界**
- 仅抓取公开页面与 robots 允许路径。
- 不登录、不绕过付费墙、不模拟注册。
- 对 `Disallow: /` 的源自动跳过。

**文档**
- `apps/crawler/README.md`
- `infra/docker/README.md`
- `docs/plan/工具导航网站整体架构蓝图.md`
- `docs/plan/工具导航网站采集流程复盘与注意事项.md`

Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
import crypto from "node:crypto";

export const PIPELINE_QUEUES = Object.freeze({
  discovery: "papaweb:queue:discovery",
  fetch: "papaweb:queue:fetch",
  normalize: "papaweb:queue:normalize",
  quality: "papaweb:queue:quality",
  publish: "papaweb:queue:publish",
});

export const TASK_STAGES = Object.freeze({
  seeded: "seeded",
  fetch: "fetch",
  normalize: "normalize",
  quality: "quality",
  publish: "publish",
});

export const TASK_STATUS = Object.freeze({
  queuedFetch: "queued_fetch",
  fetching: "fetching",
  fetchFailed: "fetch_failed",
  queuedNormalize: "queued_normalize",
  normalized: "normalized",
  queuedQuality: "queued_quality",
  qualityRejected: "quality_rejected",
  queuedPublish: "queued_publish",
  published: "published",
});

export const DEFAULT_POLICY_VERSION = "plan0-v1";

export function nowIso() {
  return new Date().toISOString();
}

export function createId(prefix) {
  const id = crypto.randomUUID();
  return prefix ? `${prefix}_${id}` : id;
}

export function encodeQueueMessage(payload) {
  return JSON.stringify(payload);
}

export function decodeQueueMessage(raw) {
  if (typeof raw !== "string" || raw.trim().length === 0) {
    throw new Error("Queue payload is empty");
  }
  const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
  if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== "object") {
    throw new Error("Queue payload must be object");
  }
  return parsed;
}

export function requireString(value, name) {
  if (typeof value !== "string" || value.trim().length === 0) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid ${name}`);
  }
  return value.trim();
}

export function requireOptionalString(value, name) {
  if (value == null) {
    return null;
  }
  if (typeof value !== "string") {
    throw new Error(`Invalid ${name}`);
  }
  const trimmed = value.trim();
  return trimmed.length > 0 ? trimmed : null;
}

export function requireOptionalNumber(value, name) {
  if (value == null || value === "") {
    return null;
  }
  const n = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(n)) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid ${name}`);
  }
  return n;
}

function requireObject(value, name) {
  if (!value || typeof value !== "object" || Array.isArray(value)) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid ${name}`);
  }
  return value;
}

function appendOptionalStringField(target, source, fieldName) {
  const value = requireOptionalString(source[fieldName], fieldName);
  if (value) {
    target[fieldName] = value;
  } else {
    delete target[fieldName];
  }
}

function appendOptionalNumberField(target, source, fieldName) {
  const value = requireOptionalNumber(source[fieldName], fieldName);
  if (value != null) {
    target[fieldName] = value;
  } else {
    delete target[fieldName];
  }
}

function normalizeTaskQueueMessage(message, options = {}) {
  const payload = requireObject(message, "queue payload");
  const normalized = {
    ...payload,
    traceId: requireString(payload.traceId, "traceId"),
    jobId: requireString(payload.jobId, "jobId"),
    taskId: requireString(payload.taskId, "taskId"),
    sourceId: requireString(payload.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    url: requireString(payload.url, "url"),
  };

  appendOptionalStringField(normalized, payload, "runId");

  if (options.includeHttpStatus) {
    appendOptionalNumberField(normalized, payload, "httpStatus");
  }

  return normalized;
}

export function validateFetchQueueMessage(message) {
  return normalizeTaskQueueMessage(message);
}

export function validateNormalizeQueueMessage(message) {
  return normalizeTaskQueueMessage(message, { includeHttpStatus: true });
}

export function validateQualityQueueMessage(message) {
  return normalizeTaskQueueMessage(message, { includeHttpStatus: true });
}

export function validatePublishQueueMessage(message) {
  return normalizeTaskQueueMessage(message);
}

export function validateDiscoveryQueueMessage(message) {
  const payload = requireObject(message, "queue payload");
  const normalized = {
    ...payload,
    traceId: requireString(payload.traceId, "traceId"),
    jobId: requireString(payload.jobId, "jobId"),
    sourceId: requireString(payload.sourceId, "sourceId"),
  };

  appendOptionalStringField(normalized, payload, "runId");
  appendOptionalStringField(normalized, payload, "requestedBy");
  appendOptionalStringField(normalized, payload, "reason");

  if (payload.overrides != null) {
    normalized.overrides = requireObject(payload.overrides, "overrides");
  }

  return normalized;
}
Tool Result #201 shell_command call_WzJUcof4bYirkJtnNti5fZSW exit 0 02:20:52
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: export async function loadPipelineMetrics(pg, redis, config) { const [taskAgg, jobAgg, discoveryDepth, fetchDepth, normalizeDepth, qu...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
export async function loadPipelineMetrics(pg, redis, config) {
  const [taskAgg, jobAgg, discoveryDepth, fetchDepth, normalizeDepth, qualityDepth, publishDepth] =
    await Promise.all([
      pg.query(
        `SELECT
           COUNT(*) AS total_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'published') AS published_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'quality_rejected') AS quality_rejected_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'fetch_failed') AS fetch_failed_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued_fetch') AS queued_fetch_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued_normalize') AS queued_normalize_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued_quality') AS queued_quality_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued_publish') AS queued_publish_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'fetching') AS fetching_tasks,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (
             WHERE status = 'fetching'
               AND COALESCE(
                 fetch_lease_expires_at,
                 updated_at + ($1::bigint * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')
               ) < NOW()
           ) AS stale_fetching_tasks,
           COALESCE(
             EXTRACT(
               EPOCH FROM (
                 NOW() - MIN(
                   CASE
                     WHEN status = 'queued_fetch' THEN COALESCE(last_fetch_enqueue_at, created_at)
                     ELSE NULL
                   END
                 )
               )
             ),
             0
           )::bigint AS oldest_queued_fetch_age_seconds
         FROM crawl_tasks`,
        [config.fetchStaleAfterMs]
      ),
      pg.query(
        `SELECT
           COUNT(*) AS total_jobs,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'discovering') AS discovering_jobs,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'queued') AS queued_jobs,
           COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completed') AS completed_jobs
         FROM crawl_jobs`
      ),
      redis.llen(config.queues.discovery),
      redis.llen(config.queues.fetch),
      redis.llen(config.queues.normalize),
      redis.llen(config.queues.quality),
      redis.llen(config.queues.publish),
    ]);

  return formatPipelineMetrics({
    taskAgg: taskAgg.rows[0] ?? {},
    jobAgg: jobAgg.rows[0] ?? {},
    queueDepths: {
      discovery: discoveryDepth,
      fetch: fetchDepth,
      normalize: normalizeDepth,
      quality: qualityDepth,
      publish: publishDepth,
    },
  });
}

export function formatPipelineMetrics({ taskAgg = {}, jobAgg = {}, queueDepths = {} }) {
  const published = toNumber(taskAgg.published_tasks);
  const rejected = toNumber(taskAgg.quality_rejected_tasks);
  const attempts = published + rejected;
  const publishPassRate = attempts > 0 ? Number((published / attempts).toFixed(4)) : 0;
  const queuedFetchTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.queued_fetch_tasks);
  const queuedNormalizeTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.queued_normalize_tasks);
  const queuedQualityTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.queued_quality_tasks);
  const queuedPublishTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.queued_publish_tasks);
  const fetchingTasks = toNumber(taskAgg.fetching_tasks);
  const normalizedQueueDepths = {
    discovery: toNumber(queueDepths.discovery),
    fetch: toNumber(queueDepths.fetch),
    normalize: toNumber(queueDepths.normalize),
    quality: toNumber(queueDepths.quality),
    publish: toNumber(queueDepths.publish),
  };

  return {
    totalTasks: toNumber(taskAgg.total_tasks),
    publishedTasks: published,
    qualityRejectedTasks: rejected,
    fetchFailedTasks: toNumber(taskAgg.fetch_failed_tasks),
    queuedFetchTasks,
    queuedNormalizeTasks,
    queuedQualityTasks,
    queuedPublishTasks,
    fetchingTasks,
    activeTaskBacklog: queuedFetchTasks + queuedNormalizeTasks + queuedQualityTasks + queuedPublishTasks + fetchingTasks,
    staleFetchingTasks: toNumber(taskAgg.stale_fetching_tasks),
    oldestQueuedFetchAgeSeconds: toNumber(taskAgg.oldest_queued_fetch_age_seconds),
    publishPassRate,
    totalJobs: toNumber(jobAgg.total_jobs),
    discoveringJobs: toNumber(jobAgg.discovering_jobs),
    queuedJobs: toNumber(jobAgg.queued_jobs),
    completedJobs: toNumber(jobAgg.completed_jobs),
    queueDepths: {
      ...normalizedQueueDepths,
      total:
        normalizedQueueDepths.discovery +
        normalizedQueueDepths.fetch +
        normalizedQueueDepths.normalize +
        normalizedQueueDepths.quality +
        normalizedQueueDepths.publish,
    },
  };
}

function toNumber(value) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0;
}

Output:
# Orchestrator Airflow (First-Party)

This directory contains first-party DAGs for papaweb platform orchestration.

- `dags/papaweb_platform_seed_pipeline.py`: triggers `/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run` on `query-api`, then snapshots `/api/v1/metrics`.

The upstream Airflow source mirror remains at `upstream-airflow/` and is not used as the runtime DAG path.

我要新增 [services/query-api/README.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/README.md) 并更新 [README.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/README.md) 的文档入口，内容聚焦这次 PR 改动到的分页、校验、seed-run 和 metrics 行为。

apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Add File: D:\demo1\papaweb\services\query-api\README.md +# Query API + +`services/query-api` 提供平台查询与手动触发入口，默认监听 `http://127.0.0.1:18787`。 + +## 启动 + +```bash...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: D:\demo1\papaweb\services\query-api\README.md
+# Query API
+
+`services/query-api` 提供平台查询与手动触发入口，默认监听 `http://127.0.0.1:18787`。
+
+## 启动
+
+```bash
+npm --workspace @papaweb/query-api start
+```
+
+平台联调时也可以直接使用根脚本启动整套 Stage D：
+
+```bash
+npm run platform:start
+```
+
+## 接口概览
+
+- `GET /healthz`
+- `GET /api/v1/tools`
+- `GET /api/v1/tasks`
+- `GET /api/v1/exports/tools.csv`
+- `GET /api/v1/exports/tasks.csv`
+- `GET /api/v1/metrics`
+- `GET /api/v1/source-sites`
+- `POST /api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`
+
+## 列表与导出过滤参数
+
+`/api/v1/tools`、`/api/v1/tasks` 和对应导出接口统一使用以下过滤字段：
+
+- `runId`
+- `jobId`
+- `sourceId`
+- `status`，仅 `/api/v1/tasks` 和 `/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv` 支持
+
+`status` 仅接受以下值：
+
+- `queued_fetch`
+- `fetching`
+- `fetch_failed`
+- `queued_normalize`
+- `normalized`
+- `queued_quality`
+- `quality_rejected`
+- `queued_publish`
+- `published`
+
+### 列表分页规则
+
+`/api/v1/tools` 与 `/api/v1/tasks` 支持：
+
+- `limit`：默认 `20`，最大 `200`
+- `page`：默认 `1`
+- `offset`：默认通过 `page` 计算
+
+约束：
+
+- `page` 和 `offset` 不能同时传
+- 非整数、空字符串、超范围值会返回 `400`
+- 不再对非法分页参数做静默纠正
+
+列表示例：
+
+```text
+GET /api/v1/tools?sourceId=futurepedia&runId=run-1&jobId=job-1&limit=20&page=1
+GET /api/v1/tasks?runId=run-1&status=queued_fetch&limit=50&offset=0
+```
+
+列表返回结构：
+
+```json
+{
+  "items": [],
+  "count": 0,
+  "total": 0,
+  "limit": 20,
+  "offset": 0,
+  "page": 1
+}
+```
+
+说明：
+
+- `count` 是当前页返回条数
+- `total` 是当前过滤条件下的总条数
+- `items` 不包含内部计算字段 `total_count`
+
+### 导出规则
+
+`/api/v1/exports/tools.csv` 与 `/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv` 复用相同过滤语义，但分页参数只有：
+
+- `limit`：默认 `1000`，最大 `5000`
+
+示例：
+
+```text
+GET /api/v1/exports/tools.csv?sourceId=futurepedia&runId=run-1&limit=100
+GET /api/v1/exports/tasks.csv?runId=run-1&sourceId=futurepedia&status=published&limit=500
+```
+
+## 手动触发 seed-run
+
+`POST /api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`
+
+请求体必须是 JSON 对象。支持字段：
+
+- `seedUrls`：字符串数组，或逗号分隔字符串
+- `sourceIds`：字符串数组，或逗号分隔字符串
+- `sourceId`：字符串，默认使用平台配置中的默认 source
+- `runId`：字符串，不传时自动生成
+- `runLabel`：字符串
+- `requestedBy`：字符串，默认 `query-api`
+- `reason`：字符串，默认 `manual_trigger`
+- `coldStart`：布尔值
+- `candidateLimitPerSource`：整数，范围 `1..10000`
+- `discoveryPageLimit`：整数，范围 `1..1000`
+
+校验规则：
+
+- 非对象请求体返回 `400`
+- 非法 JSON 返回 `400`
+- 空字符串、错误类型、越界整数返回 `400`
+- `coldStart` 只接受布尔语义值
+
+成功响应为 `202 Accepted`，失败时返回：
+
+```json
+{
+  "accepted": false,
+  "error": {
+    "code": "invalid_request_body",
+    "message": "Body field coldStart must be a boolean"
+  }
+}
+```
+
+示例：
+
+```json
+{
+  "seedUrls": ["https://example.com/source"],
+  "requestedBy": "airflow",
+  "reason": "manual_seed",
+  "coldStart": false
+}
+```
+
+## Metrics
+
+`GET /api/v1/metrics` 返回主链路排障所需的聚合指标，包括：
+
+- `totalTasks`
+- `publishedTasks`
+- `qualityRejectedTasks`
+- `fetchFailedTasks`
+- `queuedFetchTasks`
+- `queuedNormalizeTasks`
+- `queuedQualityTasks`
+- `queuedPublishTasks`
+- `fetchingTasks`
+- `activeTaskBacklog`
+- `staleFetchingTasks`
+- `oldestQueuedFetchAgeSeconds`
+- `publishPassRate`
+- `totalJobs`
+- `discoveringJobs`
+- `queuedJobs`
+- `completedJobs`
+- `queueDepths.discovery`
+- `queueDepths.fetch`
+- `queueDepths.normalize`
+- `queueDepths.quality`
+- `queueDepths.publish`
+- `queueDepths.total`
+
+其中：
+
+- `queuedNormalizeTasks` 用于区分数据库中的 normalize backlog
+- `activeTaskBacklog` 是 `queued_*` 与 `fetching` 的合计
+- `queueDepths.total` 是五个 Redis 队列长度之和
+
+## 错误返回
+
+统一错误结构：
+
+```json
+{
+  "error": {
+    "code": "invalid_query_parameter",
+    "message": "Query parameter status is invalid"
+  }
+}
+```
+
+常见错误码：
+
+- `invalid_query_parameter`
+- `invalid_request_body`
+- `invalid_json_body`
+- `internal_error`
*** Update File: D:\demo1\papaweb\README.md
@@
 **Plan0 平台化最小闭环**
 - Worker：`services/worker-seed`、`services/worker-fetch-http`、`services/worker-normalize`、`services/worker-quality`、`services/publish_worker`
 - Query API：`services/query-api`
 - Airflow DAG：`services/orchestrator-airflow/dags/papaweb_platform_seed_pipeline.py`
 - 共享包：`packages/contracts`、`packages/policy-engine`、`packages/shared`
@@
 **文档**
+- `services/query-api/README.md`
 - `apps/crawler/README.md`
 - `infra/docker/README.md`
 - `docs/plan/工具导航网站整体架构蓝图.md`
 - `docs/plan/工具导航网站采集流程复盘与注意事项.md`
*** End Patch

# Query API

`services/query-api` 鎻愪緵骞冲彴鏌ヨ涓庢墜鍔ㄨЕ鍙戝叆鍙ｏ紝榛樿鐩戝惉 `http://127.0.0.1:18787`銆?
## 鍚姩

```bash
npm --workspace @papaweb/query-api start
```

骞冲彴鑱旇皟鏃朵篃鍙互鐩存帴浣跨敤鏍硅剼鏈惎鍔ㄦ暣濂?Stage D锛?
```bash
npm run platform:start
```

## 鎺ュ彛姒傝

- `GET /healthz`
- `GET /api/v1/tools`
- `GET /api/v1/tasks`
- `GET /api/v1/exports/tools.csv`
- `GET /api/v1/exports/tasks.csv`
- `GET /api/v1/metrics`
- `GET /api/v1/source-sites`
- `POST /api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`

## 鍒楄〃涓庡鍑鸿繃婊ゅ弬鏁?
`/api/v1/tools`銆乣/api/v1/tasks` 鍜屽搴斿鍑烘帴鍙ｇ粺涓€浣跨敤浠ヤ笅杩囨护瀛楁锛?
- `runId`
- `jobId`
- `sourceId`
- `status`锛屼粎 `/api/v1/tasks` 鍜?`/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv` 鏀寔

`status` 浠呮帴鍙椾互涓嬪€硷細

- `queued_fetch`
- `fetching`
- `fetch_failed`
- `queued_normalize`
- `normalized`
- `queued_quality`
- `quality_rejected`
- `queued_publish`
- `published`

### 鍒楄〃鍒嗛〉瑙勫垯

`/api/v1/tools` 涓?`/api/v1/tasks` 鏀寔锛?
- `limit`锛氶粯璁?`20`锛屾渶澶?`200`
- `page`锛氶粯璁?`1`
- `offset`锛氶粯璁ら€氳繃 `page` 璁＄畻

绾︽潫锛?
- `page` 鍜?`offset` 涓嶈兘鍚屾椂浼?- 闈炴暣鏁般€佺┖瀛楃涓层€佽秴鑼冨洿鍊间細杩斿洖 `400`
- 涓嶅啀瀵归潪娉曞垎椤靛弬鏁板仛闈欓粯绾犳

鍒楄〃绀轰緥锛?
```text
GET /api/v1/tools?sourceId=futurepedia&runId=run-1&jobId=job-1&limit=20&page=1
GET /api/v1/tasks?runId=run-1&status=queued_fetch&limit=50&offset=0
```

鍒楄〃杩斿洖缁撴瀯锛?
```json
{
  "items": [],
  "count": 0,
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 20,
  "offset": 0,
  "page": 1
}
```

璇存槑锛?
- `count` 鏄綋鍓嶉〉杩斿洖鏉℃暟
- `total` 鏄綋鍓嶈繃婊ゆ潯浠朵笅鐨勬€绘潯鏁?- `items` 涓嶅寘鍚唴閮ㄨ绠楀瓧娈?`total_count`

### 瀵煎嚭瑙勫垯

`/api/v1/exports/tools.csv` 涓?`/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv` 澶嶇敤鐩稿悓杩囨护璇箟锛屼絾鍒嗛〉鍙傛暟鍙湁锛?
- `limit`锛氶粯璁?`1000`锛屾渶澶?`5000`

绀轰緥锛?
```text
GET /api/v1/exports/tools.csv?sourceId=futurepedia&runId=run-1&limit=100
GET /api/v1/exports/tasks.csv?runId=run-1&sourceId=futurepedia&status=published&limit=500
```

## 鎵嬪姩瑙﹀彂 seed-run

`POST /api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`

璇锋眰浣撳繀椤绘槸 JSON 瀵硅薄銆傛敮鎸佸瓧娈碉細

- `seedUrls`锛氬瓧绗︿覆鏁扮粍锛屾垨閫楀彿鍒嗛殧瀛楃涓?- `sourceIds`锛氬瓧绗︿覆鏁扮粍锛屾垨閫楀彿鍒嗛殧瀛楃涓?- `sourceId`锛氬瓧绗︿覆锛岄粯璁や娇鐢ㄥ钩鍙伴厤缃腑鐨勯粯璁?source
- `runId`锛氬瓧绗︿覆锛屼笉浼犳椂鑷姩鐢熸垚
- `runLabel`锛氬瓧绗︿覆
- `requestedBy`锛氬瓧绗︿覆锛岄粯璁?`query-api`
- `reason`锛氬瓧绗︿覆锛岄粯璁?`manual_trigger`
- `coldStart`锛氬竷灏斿€?- `candidateLimitPerSource`锛氭暣鏁帮紝鑼冨洿 `1..10000`
- `discoveryPageLimit`锛氭暣鏁帮紝鑼冨洿 `1..1000`

鏍￠獙瑙勫垯锛?
- 闈炲璞¤姹備綋杩斿洖 `400`
- 闈炴硶 JSON 杩斿洖 `400`
- 绌哄瓧绗︿覆銆侀敊璇被鍨嬨€佽秺鐣屾暣鏁拌繑鍥?`400`
- `coldStart` 鍙帴鍙楀竷灏旇涔夊€?
鎴愬姛鍝嶅簲涓?`202 Accepted`锛屽け璐ユ椂杩斿洖锛?
```json
{
  "accepted": false,
  "error": {
    "code": "invalid_request_body",
    "message": "Body field coldStart must be a boolean"
  }
}
```

绀轰緥锛?
```json
{
  "seedUrls": ["https://example.com/source"],
  "requestedBy": "airflow",
  "reason": "manual_seed",
  "coldStart": false
}
```

## Metrics

`GET /api/v1/metrics` 杩斿洖涓婚摼璺帓闅滄墍闇€鐨勮仛鍚堟寚鏍囷紝鍖呮嫭锛?
- `totalTasks`
- `publishedTasks`
- `qualityRejectedTasks`
- `fetchFailedTasks`
- `queuedFetchTasks`
- `queuedNormalizeTasks`
- `queuedQualityTasks`
- `queuedPublishTasks`
- `fetchingTasks`
- `activeTaskBacklog`
- `staleFetchingTasks`
- `oldestQueuedFetchAgeSeconds`
- `publishPassRate`
- `totalJobs`
- `discoveringJobs`
- `queuedJobs`
- `completedJobs`
- `queueDepths.discovery`
- `queueDepths.fetch`
- `queueDepths.normalize`
- `queueDepths.quality`
- `queueDepths.publish`
- `queueDepths.total`

鍏朵腑锛?
- `queuedNormalizeTasks` 鐢ㄤ簬鍖哄垎鏁版嵁搴撲腑鐨?normalize backlog
- `activeTaskBacklog` 鏄?`queued_*` 涓?`fetching` 鐨勫悎璁?- `queueDepths.total` 鏄簲涓?Redis 闃熷垪闀垮害涔嬪拰

缁熶竴閿欒缁撴瀯锛?

```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "invalid_query_parameter",
    "message": "Query parameter status is invalid"
  }
}
```

- `invalid_query_parameter`
- `invalid_request_body`
- `invalid_json_body`
- `internal_error`

74:璇存槑锛?
75:- `count` 鏄綋鍓嶉〉杩斿洖鏉℃暟
76:- `total` 鏄綋鍓嶈繃婊ゆ潯浠朵笅鐨勬€绘潯鏁?- `items` 涓嶅寘鍚唴閮ㄨ绠楀瓧娈?`total_count`
77:
78:### 瀵煎嚭瑙勫垯
79:
80:`/api/v1/exports/tools.csv` 涓?`/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv` 澶嶇敤鐩稿悓杩囨护璇箟锛屼絾鍒嗛〉鍙傛暟鍙湁锛?
81:- `limit`锛氶粯璁?`1000`锛屾渶澶?`5000`
82:
83:绀轰緥锛?
84:```text
85:GET /api/v1/exports/tools.csv?sourceId=futurepedia&runId=run-1&limit=100
86:GET /api/v1/exports/tasks.csv?runId=run-1&sourceId=futurepedia&status=published&limit=500
87:```
88:
89:## 鎵嬪姩瑙﹀彂 seed-run
90:
91:`POST /api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`
92:
93:璇锋眰浣撳繀椤绘槸 JSON 瀵硅薄銆傛敮鎸佸瓧娈碉細
94:
95:- `seedUrls`锛氬瓧绗︿覆鏁扮粍锛屾垨閫楀彿鍒嗛殧瀛楃涓?- `sourceIds`锛氬瓧绗︿覆鏁扮粍锛屾垨閫楀彿鍒嗛殧瀛楃涓?- `sourceId`锛氬瓧绗︿覆锛岄粯璁や娇鐢ㄥ钩鍙伴厤缃腑鐨勯粯璁?source
96:- `runId`锛氬瓧绗︿覆锛屼笉浼犳椂鑷姩鐢熸垚
97:- `runLabel`锛氬瓧绗︿覆
98:- `requestedBy`锛氬瓧绗︿覆锛岄粯璁?`query-api`
99:- `reason`锛氬瓧绗︿覆锛岄粯璁?`manual_trigger`
100:- `coldStart`锛氬竷灏斿€?- `candidateLimitPerSource`锛氭暣鏁帮紝鑼冨洿 `1..10000`
101:- `discoveryPageLimit`锛氭暣鏁帮紝鑼冨洿 `1..1000`
102:
103:鏍￠獙瑙勫垯锛?
104:- 闈炲璞¤姹備綋杩斿洖 `400`
105:- 闈炴硶 JSON 杩斿洖 `400`
106:- 绌哄瓧绗︿覆銆侀敊璇被鍨嬨€佽秺鐣屾暣鏁拌繑鍥?`400`
107:- `coldStart` 鍙帴鍙楀竷灏旇涔夊€?
108:鎴愬姛鍝嶅簲涓?`202 Accepted`锛屽け璐ユ椂杩斿洖锛?
109:```json
110:{
111:  "accepted": false,
112:  "error": {
113:    "code": "invalid_request_body",
114:    "message": "Body field coldStart must be a boolean"
115:  }
116:}
117:```
118:
119:绀轰緥锛?
120:```json
121:{
122:  "seedUrls": ["https://example.com/source"],
123:  "requestedBy": "airflow",
124:  "reason": "manual_seed",
125:  "coldStart": false
126:}
127:```
128:
129:## Metrics
130:
131:`GET /api/v1/metrics` 杩斿洖涓婚摼璺帓闅滄墍闇€鐨勮仛鍚堟寚鏍囷紝鍖呮嫭锛?
132:- `totalTasks`
133:- `publishedTasks`
134:- `qualityRejectedTasks`
135:- `fetchFailedTasks`
136:- `queuedFetchTasks`
137:- `queuedNormalizeTasks`
138:- `queuedQualityTasks`
139:- `queuedPublishTasks`
140:- `fetchingTasks`
141:- `activeTaskBacklog`
142:- `staleFetchingTasks`
143:- `oldestQueuedFetchAgeSeconds`
144:- `publishPassRate`
145:- `totalJobs`
146:- `discoveringJobs`
147:- `queuedJobs`
148:- `completedJobs`
149:- `queueDepths.discovery`
150:- `queueDepths.fetch`
151:- `queueDepths.normalize`
152:- `queueDepths.quality`
153:- `queueDepths.publish`
154:- `queueDepths.total`
155:
156:鍏朵腑锛?
157:- `queuedNormalizeTasks` 鐢ㄤ簬鍖哄垎鏁版嵁搴撲腑鐨?normalize backlog
158:- `activeTaskBacklog` 鏄?`queued_*` 涓?`fetching` 鐨勫悎璁?- `queueDepths.total` 鏄簲涓?Redis 闃熷垪闀垮害涔嬪拰
159:
160:## 閿欒杩斿洖
161:
162:缁熶竴閿欒缁撴瀯锛?

164:{
165:  "error": {

167:    "message": "Query parameter status is invalid"
168:  }
169:}
170:```

175:- `invalid_request_body`

assistant #238 commentary 02:22:58

文档内容是对的，但新文件里有几处 Markdown 列表行被挤到了一起。我直接重写一遍文件，保证换行和渲染都正常。

Tool Call #239 shell_command call_mwGjRX792vrPnG7EUcQiHxjf 02:23:26
shell_command input={"command":"@'\n# Query API\n\n`services/query-api` 提供平台查询与手动触发入口，默认监听 `http://127.0.0.1:18787`。\n\n## 启动\n\n```bash\nnpm --workspace @papaweb/query-api start\n```\n\n平台联调时也可以直接...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "@'\n# Query API\n\n`services/query-api` 提供平台查询与手动触发入口，默认监听 `http://127.0.0.1:18787`。\n\n## 启动\n\n```bash\nnpm --workspace @papaweb/query-api start\n```\n\n平台联调时也可以直接使用根脚本启动整套 Stage D：\n\n```bash\nnpm run platform:start\n```\n\n## 接口概览\n\n- `GET /healthz`\n- `GET /api/v1/tools`\n- `GET /api/v1/tasks`\n- `GET /api/v1/exports/tools.csv`\n- `GET /api/v1/exports/tasks.csv`\n- `GET /api/v1/metrics`\n- `GET /api/v1/source-sites`\n- `POST /api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`\n\n## 列表与导出过滤参数\n\n`/api/v1/tools`、`/api/v1/tasks` 和对应导出接口统一使用以下过滤字段：\n\n- `runId`\n- `jobId`\n- `sourceId`\n- `status`，仅 `/api/v1/tasks` 和 `/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv` 支持\n\n`status` 仅接受以下值：\n\n- `queued_fetch`\n- `fetching`\n- `fetch_failed`\n- `queued_normalize`\n- `normalized`\n- `queued_quality`\n- `quality_rejected`\n- `queued_publish`\n- `published`\n\n### 列表分页规则\n\n`/api/v1/tools` 与 `/api/v1/tasks` 支持：\n\n- `limit`：默认 `20`，最大 `200`\n- `page`：默认 `1`\n- `offset`：默认通过 `page` 计算\n\n约束：\n\n- `page` 和 `offset` 不能同时传\n- 非整数、空字符串、超范围值会返回 `400`\n- 不再对非法分页参数做静默纠正\n\n列表示例：\n\n```text\nGET /api/v1/tools?sourceId=futurepedia&runId=run-1&jobId=job-1&limit=20&page=1\nGET /api/v1/tasks?runId=run-1&status=queued_fetch&limit=50&offset=0\n```\n\n列表返回结构：\n\n```json\n{\n  \"items\": [],\n  \"count\": 0,\n  \"total\": 0,\n  \"limit\": 20,\n  \"offset\": 0,\n  \"page\": 1\n}\n```\n\n说明：\n\n- `count` 是当前页返回条数\n- `total` 是当前过滤条件下的总条数\n- `items` 不包含内部计算字段 `total_count`\n\n### 导出规则\n\n`/api/v1/exports/tools.csv` 与 `/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv` 复用相同过滤语义，但分页参数只有：\n\n- `limit`：默认 `1000`，最大 `5000`\n\n示例：\n\n```text\nGET /api/v1/exports/tools.csv?sourceId=futurepedia&runId=run-1&limit=100\nGET /api/v1/exports/tasks.csv?runId=run-1&sourceId=futurepedia&status=published&limit=500\n```\n\n## 手动触发 seed-run\n\n`POST /api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`\n\n请求体必须是 JSON 对象。支持字段：\n\n- `seedUrls`：字符串数组，或逗号分隔字符串\n- `sourceIds`：字符串数组，或逗号分隔字符串\n- `sourceId`：字符串，默认使用平台配置中的默认 source\n- `runId`：字符串，不传时自动生成\n- `runLabel`：字符串\n- `requestedBy`：字符串，默认 `query-api`\n- `reason`：字符串，默认 `manual_trigger`\n- `coldStart`：布尔值\n- `candidateLimitPerSource`：整数，范围 `1..10000`\n- `discoveryPageLimit`：整数，范围 `1..1000`\n\n校验规则：\n\n- 非对象请求体返回 `400`\n- 非法 JSON 返回 `400`\n- 空字符串、错误类型、越界整数返回 `400`\n- `coldStart` 只接受布尔语义值\n\n成功响应为 `202 Accepted`，失败时返回：\n\n```json\n{\n  \"accepted\": false,\n  \"error\": {\n    \"code\": \"invalid_request_body\",\n    \"message\": \"Body field coldStart must be a boolean\"\n  }\n}\n```\n\n示例：\n\n```json\n{\n  \"seedUrls\": [\"https://example.com/source\"],\n  \"requestedBy\": \"airflow\",\n  \"reason\": \"manual_seed\",\n  \"coldStart\": false\n}\n```\n\n## Metrics\n\n`GET /api/v1/metrics` 返回主链路排障所需的聚合指标，包括：\n\n- `totalTasks`\n- `publishedTasks`\n- `qualityRejectedTasks`\n- `fetchFailedTasks`\n- `queuedFetchTasks`\n- `queuedNormalizeTasks`\n- `queuedQualityTasks`\n- `queuedPublishTasks`\n- `fetchingTasks`\n- `activeTaskBacklog`\n- `staleFetchingTasks`\n- `oldestQueuedFetchAgeSeconds`\n- `publishPassRate`\n- `totalJobs`\n- `discoveringJobs`\n- `queuedJobs`\n- `completedJobs`\n- `queueDepths.discovery`\n- `queueDepths.fetch`\n- `queueDepths.normalize`\n- `queueDepths.quality`\n- `queueDepths.publish`\n- `queueDepths.total`\n\n其中：\n\n- `queuedNormalizeTasks` 用于区分数据库中的 normalize backlog\n- `activeTaskBacklog` 是 `queued_*` 与 `fetching` 的合计\n- `queueDepths.total` 是五个 Redis 队列长度之和\n\n## 错误返回\n\n统一错误结构：\n\n```json\n{\n  \"error\": {\n    \"code\": \"invalid_query_parameter\",\n    \"message\": \"Query parameter status is invalid\"\n  }\n}\n```\n\n常见错误码：\n\n- `invalid_query_parameter`\n- `invalid_request_body`\n- `invalid_json_body`\n- `internal_error`\n'@ | Set-Content -Path 'services\\query-api\\README.md' -Encoding utf8",
  "workdir": "D:\\demo1\\papaweb",
  "timeout_ms": 10000
}

Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
1:# Query API
2:
3:`services/query-api` 提供平台查询与手动触发入口，默认监听 `http://127.0.0.1:18787`。
4:
5:## 启动
6:
7:```bash
8:npm --workspace @papaweb/query-api start
9:```
10:
11:平台联调时也可以直接使用根脚本启动整套 Stage D：
12:
13:```bash
14:npm run platform:start
15:```
16:
17:## 接口概览
18:
19:- `GET /healthz`
20:- `GET /api/v1/tools`
21:- `GET /api/v1/tasks`
22:- `GET /api/v1/exports/tools.csv`
23:- `GET /api/v1/exports/tasks.csv`
24:- `GET /api/v1/metrics`
25:- `GET /api/v1/source-sites`
26:- `POST /api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`
27:
28:## 列表与导出过滤参数
29:
30:`/api/v1/tools`、`/api/v1/tasks` 和对应导出接口统一使用以下过滤字段：
31:
32:- `runId`
33:- `jobId`
34:- `sourceId`
35:- `status`，仅 `/api/v1/tasks` 和 `/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv` 支持
36:
37:`status` 仅接受以下值：
38:
39:- `queued_fetch`
40:- `fetching`
41:- `fetch_failed`
42:- `queued_normalize`
43:- `normalized`
44:- `queued_quality`
45:- `quality_rejected`
46:- `queued_publish`
47:- `published`
48:
49:### 列表分页规则
50:
51:`/api/v1/tools` 与 `/api/v1/tasks` 支持：
52:
53:- `limit`：默认 `20`，最大 `200`
54:- `page`：默认 `1`
55:- `offset`：默认通过 `page` 计算
56:
57:约束：
58:
59:- `page` 和 `offset` 不能同时传
60:- 非整数、空字符串、超范围值会返回 `400`
61:- 不再对非法分页参数做静默纠正
62:
63:列表示例：
64:
65:```text
66:GET /api/v1/tools?sourceId=futurepedia&runId=run-1&jobId=job-1&limit=20&page=1
67:GET /api/v1/tasks?runId=run-1&status=queued_fetch&limit=50&offset=0
68:```
69:
70:列表返回结构：
71:
72:```json
73:{
74:  "items": [],
75:  "count": 0,
76:  "total": 0,
77:  "limit": 20,
78:  "offset": 0,
79:  "page": 1
80:}
81:```
82:
83:说明：
84:
85:- `count` 是当前页返回条数
86:- `total` 是当前过滤条件下的总条数
87:- `items` 不包含内部计算字段 `total_count`
88:
89:### 导出规则
90:
91:`/api/v1/exports/tools.csv` 与 `/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv` 复用相同过滤语义，但分页参数只有：
92:
93:- `limit`：默认 `1000`，最大 `5000`
94:
95:示例：
96:
97:```text
98:GET /api/v1/exports/tools.csv?sourceId=futurepedia&runId=run-1&limit=100
99:GET /api/v1/exports/tasks.csv?runId=run-1&sourceId=futurepedia&status=published&limit=500
100:```
101:
102:## 手动触发 seed-run
103:
104:`POST /api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`
105:
106:请求体必须是 JSON 对象。支持字段：
107:
108:- `seedUrls`：字符串数组，或逗号分隔字符串
109:- `sourceIds`：字符串数组，或逗号分隔字符串
110:- `sourceId`：字符串，默认使用平台配置中的默认 source
111:- `runId`：字符串，不传时自动生成
112:- `runLabel`：字符串
113:- `requestedBy`：字符串，默认 `query-api`
114:- `reason`：字符串，默认 `manual_trigger`
115:- `coldStart`：布尔值
116:- `candidateLimitPerSource`：整数，范围 `1..10000`
117:- `discoveryPageLimit`：整数，范围 `1..1000`
118:
119:校验规则：
120:
121:- 非对象请求体返回 `400`
122:- 非法 JSON 返回 `400`
123:- 空字符串、错误类型、越界整数返回 `400`
124:- `coldStart` 只接受布尔语义值
125:
126:成功响应为 `202 Accepted`，失败时返回：
127:
128:```json
129:{
130:  "accepted": false,
131:  "error": {
132:    "code": "invalid_request_body",
133:    "message": "Body field coldStart must be a boolean"
134:  }
135:}
136:```
137:
138:示例：
139:
140:```json
141:{
142:  "seedUrls": ["https://example.com/source"],
143:  "requestedBy": "airflow",
144:  "reason": "manual_seed",
145:  "coldStart": false
146:}
147:```
148:
149:## Metrics
150:
151:`GET /api/v1/metrics` 返回主链路排障所需的聚合指标，包括：
152:
153:- `totalTasks`
154:- `publishedTasks`
155:- `qualityRejectedTasks`
156:- `fetchFailedTasks`
157:- `queuedFetchTasks`
158:- `queuedNormalizeTasks`
159:- `queuedQualityTasks`
160:- `queuedPublishTasks`
161:- `fetchingTasks`
162:- `activeTaskBacklog`
163:- `staleFetchingTasks`
164:- `oldestQueuedFetchAgeSeconds`
165:- `publishPassRate`
166:- `totalJobs`
167:- `discoveringJobs`
168:- `queuedJobs`
169:- `completedJobs`
170:- `queueDepths.discovery`
171:- `queueDepths.fetch`
172:- `queueDepths.normalize`
173:- `queueDepths.quality`
174:- `queueDepths.publish`
175:- `queueDepths.total`
176:
177:其中：
178:
179:- `queuedNormalizeTasks` 用于区分数据库中的 normalize backlog
180:- `activeTaskBacklog` 是 `queued_*` 与 `fetching` 的合计
181:- `queueDepths.total` 是五个 Redis 队列长度之和
182:
183:## 错误返回
184:
185:统一错误结构：
186:
187:```json
188:{
189:  "error": {
190:    "code": "invalid_query_parameter",
191:    "message": "Query parameter status is invalid"
192:  }
193:}
194:```
195:
196:常见错误码：
197:
198:- `invalid_query_parameter`
199:- `invalid_request_body`
200:- `invalid_json_body`
201:- `internal_error`

    "settings": {
      "model": "gpt-5.4",
      "reasoning_effort": "xhigh",
      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

Output:
{"baseRefName":"dev","body":"## Purpose and Scope\n- Tighten `query-api` around filter consistency, pagination semantics, request validation, and testability instead of adding duplicate API surface.\n- Refactor the API entrypoint into a dependency-injectable app factory so HTTP behavior can be tested directly.\n- Improve `/metrics` with normalize backlog visibility and a total queue-depth summary for faster pipeline troubleshooting.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- `/tools`, `/tasks`, and export endpoints use the same filter names and return clearer list semantics with `limit`, `offset`, `page`, `count`, and `total`.\n- List pagination enforces explicit bounds and rejects conflicting/invalid parameters instead of silently coercing them.\n- `/pipeline/seed-run` validates request fields and returns clear `400` responses for invalid body input.\n- `/metrics` exposes enough backlog information to troubleshoot the main chain without guessing normalize-stage pressure from queue depth alone.\n\n## Test Evidence\n- `npm --workspace @papaweb/query-api test`\n- `npm run test:unit`\n- `npm run test:e2e`\n\n## Risks\n- Clients that relied on silent coercion of invalid `limit`, `page`, `offset`, or seed-run body fields will now receive `400` responses and need to correct the request.\n- `query-api` import behavior changed from immediate startup side effects to an explicit `main()` path; runtime is covered by unit and E2E, but this is still a structural change.\n\n## Rollback\n- Revert commit `7833c5d` from `dev`.\n- Re-run `npm run test:unit` and `npm run test:e2e` on the revert PR before merging.\n","headRefName":"feature/pr-09-query-api-filters","title":"feat(query-api): tighten filters and seed-run validation"}
Tool Result #285 shell_command call_G7auklqTs1SFrx9S1WCYqnvV exit 0 02:32:45

Tool Call #289 shell_command call_5GxcGRvyIGyvhfNzn26RDJpv 02:33:16
shell_command input={"command":"@'\n## Purpose and Scope\n- Tighten `query-api` around filter consistency, pagination semantics, request validation, and testability instead of adding duplicate API ...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "@'\n## Purpose and Scope\n- Tighten `query-api` around filter consistency, pagination semantics, request validation, and testability instead of adding duplicate API surface.\n- Refactor the API entrypoint into a dependency-injectable app factory so HTTP behavior can be tested directly.\n- Improve `/metrics` with normalize backlog visibility and a total queue-depth summary for faster pipeline troubleshooting.\n- Document Query API filter semantics, `seed-run` validation behavior, and metrics fields in `services/query-api/README.md`.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- `/tools`, `/tasks`, and export endpoints use the same filter names and return clearer list semantics with `limit`, `offset`, `page`, `count`, and `total`.\n- List pagination enforces explicit bounds and rejects conflicting or invalid parameters instead of silently coercing them.\n- `/pipeline/seed-run` validates request fields and returns clear `400` responses for invalid body input.\n- `/metrics` exposes enough backlog information to troubleshoot the main chain without guessing normalize-stage pressure from queue depth alone.\n- User-facing usage changes are documented in `services/query-api/README.md`.\n\n## Test Evidence\n- `npm --workspace @papaweb/query-api test`\n- `npm run test:unit`\n- `npm run test:e2e`\n\n## Documentation\n- Added `services/query-api/README.md` for Query API startup, filters, pagination, exports, `seed-run`, metrics, and error semantics.\n- Added the Query API README entry to the root `README.md`.\n\n## Risks\n- Clients that relied on silent coercion of invalid `limit`, `page`, `offset`, or `seed-run` body fields will now receive `400` responses and need to correct the request.\n- `query-api` import behavior changed from immediate startup side effects to an explicit `main()` path; runtime is covered by unit and E2E, but this is still a structural change.\n\n## Rollback\n- Revert commits `7833c5d` and `b627793` from `dev`, or revert the squash merge commit after merge.\n- Re-run `npm run test:unit` and `npm run test:e2e` on the revert PR before merging.\n'@ | Set-Content -Path .git\\pr18-body.md -Encoding utf8; gh pr edit 18 --body-file .git\\pr18-body.md",
  "workdir": "D:\\demo1\\papaweb",
  "timeout_ms": 30000
}

{"body":"﻿## Purpose and Scope\n- Tighten `query-api` around filter consistency, pagination semantics, request validation, and testability instead of adding duplicate API surface.\n- Refactor the API entrypoint into a dependency-injectable app factory so HTTP behavior can be tested directly.\n- Improve `/metrics` with normalize backlog visibility and a total queue-depth summary for faster pipeline troubleshooting.\n- Document Query API filter semantics, `seed-run` validation behavior, and metrics fields in `services/query-api/README.md`.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- `/tools`, `/tasks`, and export endpoints use the same filter names and return clearer list semantics with `limit`, `offset`, `page`, `count`, and `total`.\n- List pagination enforces explicit bounds and rejects conflicting or invalid parameters instead of silently coercing them.\n- `/pipeline/seed-run` validates request fields and returns clear `400` responses for invalid body input.\n- `/metrics` exposes enough backlog information to troubleshoot the main chain without guessing normalize-stage pressure from queue depth alone.\n- User-facing usage changes are documented in `services/query-api/README.md`.\n\n## Test Evidence\n- `npm --workspace @papaweb/query-api test`\n- `npm run test:unit`\n- `npm run test:e2e`\n\n## Documentation\n- Added `services/query-api/README.md` for Query API startup, filters, pagination, exports, `seed-run`, metrics, and error semantics.\n- Added the Query API README entry to the root `README.md`.\n\n## Risks\n- Clients that relied on silent coercion of invalid `limit`, `page`, `offset`, or `seed-run` body fields will now receive `400` responses and need to correct the request.\n- `query-api` import behavior changed from immediate startup side effects to an explicit `main()` path; runtime is covered by unit and E2E, but this is still a structural change.\n\n## Rollback\n- Revert commits `7833c5d` and `b627793` from `dev`, or revert the squash merge commit after merge.\n- Re-run `npm run test:unit` and `npm run test:e2e` on the revert PR before merging.\r\n","updatedAt":"2026-03-18T02:33:20Z"}

shell_command input={"command":"$body = @'\n## Purpose and Scope\n- Tighten `query-api` around filter consistency, pagination semantics, request validation, and testability instead of adding duplic...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$body = @'\n## Purpose and Scope\n- Tighten `query-api` around filter consistency, pagination semantics, request validation, and testability instead of adding duplicate API surface.\n- Refactor the API entrypoint into a dependency-injectable app factory so HTTP behavior can be tested directly.\n- Improve `/metrics` with normalize backlog visibility and a total queue-depth summary for faster pipeline troubleshooting.\n- Document Query API filter semantics, `seed-run` validation behavior, and metrics fields in `services/query-api/README.md`.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- `/tools`, `/tasks`, and export endpoints use the same filter names and return clearer list semantics with `limit`, `offset`, `page`, `count`, and `total`.\n- List pagination enforces explicit bounds and rejects conflicting or invalid parameters instead of silently coercing them.\n- `/pipeline/seed-run` validates request fields and returns clear `400` responses for invalid body input.\n- `/metrics` exposes enough backlog information to troubleshoot the main chain without guessing normalize-stage pressure from queue depth alone.\n- User-facing usage changes are documented in `services/query-api/README.md`.\n\n## Test Evidence\n- `npm --workspace @papaweb/query-api test`\n- `npm run test:unit`\n- `npm run test:e2e`\n\n## Documentation\n- Added `services/query-api/README.md` for Query API startup, filters, pagination, exports, `seed-run`, metrics, and error semantics.\n- Added the Query API README entry to the root `README.md`.\n\n## Risks\n- Clients that relied on silent coercion of invalid `limit`, `page`, `offset`, or `seed-run` body fields will now receive `400` responses and need to correct the request.\n- `query-api` import behavior changed from immediate startup side effects to an explicit `main()` path; runtime is covered by unit and E2E, but this is still a structural change.\n\n## Rollback\n- Revert commits `7833c5d` and `b627793` from `dev`, or revert the squash merge commit after merge.\n- Re-run `npm run test:unit` and `npm run test:e2e` on the revert PR before merging.\n'@; $enc = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding($false); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText((Join-Path (Get-Location) '.git\\pr18-body.md'), $body, $enc); gh pr edit 18 --body-file .git\\pr18-body.md; Remove-Item .git\\pr18-body.md -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue",
  "workdir": "D:\\demo1\\papaweb",
  "timeout_ms": 30000
}

{
  "turn_id": "019cfecb-a2d4-70b1-b1ae-e98a4bc9ac2b",
  "cwd": "D:\\demo1\\papaweb",
  "current_date": "2026-03-18",
  "timezone": "Asia/Shanghai",
  "approval_policy": "never",
  "sandbox_policy": {
    "type": "danger-full-access"
  },
  "model": "gpt-5.4",
  "personality": "pragmatic",
  "collaboration_mode": {
    "mode": "default",
    "settings": {
      "model": "gpt-5.4",
      "reasoning_effort": "xhigh",
      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

assistant #356 final_answer 02:42:12

接下来按这个顺序做。

1. 同步本地 dev
- 现在远端 dev 已经包含 #18，但你本地还停在 feature/pr-09-query-api-filters，本地 dev 还没更新。
- 执行：

git switch dev
git pull --ff-only origin dev

2. 清理已合并分支
- 本地分支可以删：

git branch -d feature/pr-09-query-api-filters

- 远端分支如果仓库没自动删，再删：

git push origin --delete feature/pr-09-query-api-filters

3. 开下一条分支
- 按计划，下一项是 PR-10：
- 分支：feature/pr-10-e2e-regression-runbook
- 范围：apps/crawler/tests、docs、必要运行脚本
- 目标：把前 9 个 PR 收敛成一条可重复执行的主链路回归
- 核心验收：seed -> fetch -> normalize -> quality -> publish -> query
- 从最新 dev 切：

git switch -c feature/pr-10-e2e-regression-runbook

4. 这一轮该做什么
- 补或完善 1 条完整主链路 E2E
- 补发布 / 回滚 Runbook
- 明确失败定位入口、执行命令、恢复步骤
- 跑：

npm run test
npm run test:e2e

注意：
- 你工作区里还有未跟踪的 .claude/ 和 data/，切分支前确认它们不是这次要提交的内容。

如果你要，我可以直接帮你执行第 1 到第 3 步，并开始搭 PR-10 的骨架。

1. 同步本地 dev
- 现在远端 dev 已经包含 #18，但你本地还停在 feature/pr-09-query-api-filters，本地 dev 还没更新。

git pull --ff-only origin dev

2. 清理已合并分支
- 本地分支可以删：

git branch -d feature/pr-09-query-api-filters

- 远端分支如果仓库没自动删，再删：

git push origin --delete feature/pr-09-query-api-filters

3. 开下一条分支
- 按计划，下一项是 PR-10：
- 分支：feature/pr-10-e2e-regression-runbook
- 范围：apps/crawler/tests、docs、必要运行脚本

- 核心验收：seed -> fetch -> normalize -> quality -> publish -> query
- 从最新 dev 切：

git switch -c feature/pr-10-e2e-regression-runbook

4. 这一轮该做什么

- 补发布 / 回滚 Runbook
- 明确失败定位入口、执行命令、恢复步骤

      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

import test from "node:test";
import assert from "node:assert/strict";
import { mkdir, readFile, rm, writeFile } from "node:fs/promises";
import { dirname, resolve } from "node:path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";
import { execFile } from "node:child_process";
import { promisify } from "node:util";

const execFileAsync = promisify(execFile);
const root = resolve(dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)), "..");

test("clean stage e2e smoke: raw jsonl -> clean outputs", async () => {
  const runId = `e2e-clean-${Date.now()}`;
  const rawDir = resolve(root, "data", "raw", runId);
  const cleanDir = resolve(root, "data", "clean", runId);
  const rawFile = resolve(rawDir, "tool_candidates_raw.jsonl");
  const previewFile = resolve(cleanDir, "tool_entities_preview.jsonl");
  const summaryFile = resolve(cleanDir, "summary.json");

  await mkdir(rawDir, { recursive: true });

  const rawRow = {
    run_id: runId,
    source_id: "source-a",
    source_type: "catalog",
    source_name: "demo-source",
    source_base_host: "example.com",
    page_url: "https://example.com/item",
    page_title: "Demo Tool",
    meta_description: "Demo description",
    h1: "Demo Tool",
    external_links: ["https://tool.example.org/landing?utm_source=demo"],
    official_links_hints: ["https://tool.example.org/landing?utm_source=demo"],
    captured_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    raw_file: "raw/source-a/page-1.html",
    http_status: 200,
  };

  await writeFile(rawFile, `${JSON.stringify(rawRow)}\n`, "utf8");

  await execFileAsync(process.execPath, ["src/clean.mjs", "--run-id", runId], {
    cwd: root,
  });

  const previewRaw = await readFile(previewFile, "utf8");
  assert.ok(previewRaw.trim().length > 0, "preview jsonl should not be empty");

  const summary = JSON.parse(await readFile(summaryFile, "utf8"));
  assert.equal(summary.run_id, runId);
  assert.equal(summary.input_rows, 1);
  assert.ok(summary.output_entities >= 1, "should produce at least one entity");

  await rm(rawDir, { recursive: true, force: true });
  await rm(cleanDir, { recursive: true, force: true });
});

Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
import { spawn } from "node:child_process";
import path from "node:path";
import process from "node:process";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
const REPO_ROOT = path.resolve(__dirname, "..");
const SCRIPT_ROOT = path.join(REPO_ROOT, "infra", "docker");

const COMMANDS = new Set(["start", "health", "smoke", "test", "e2e"]);

function parseArgs(argv) {
  const args = {
    command: "health",
    build: false,
    withGrafana: false,
    timeoutSec: 300,
    minPublished: 1,
  };

  if (argv.length > 0 && COMMANDS.has(argv[0])) {
    args.command = argv[0];
    argv = argv.slice(1);
  }

  for (let i = 0; i < argv.length; i += 1) {
    const token = argv[i];
    const next = argv[i + 1];

    if (token === "--build") {
      args.build = true;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--with-grafana") {
      args.withGrafana = true;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--timeout-sec" && next) {
      args.timeoutSec = Number(next);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--min-published" && next) {
      args.minPublished = Number(next);
      i += 1;
    }
  }

  if (!Number.isInteger(args.timeoutSec) || args.timeoutSec <= 0) {
    args.timeoutSec = 300;
  }
  if (!Number.isInteger(args.minPublished) || args.minPublished <= 0) {
    args.minPublished = 1;
  }

  return args;
}

function getShellCommand() {
  return process.platform === "win32" ? "powershell" : "pwsh";
}

function quotePowerShell(text) {
  return `'${String(text).replaceAll("'", "''")}'`;
}

function toPowerShellBool(value) {
  return value ? "$true" : "$false";
}

function runPowerShell(command) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const child = spawn(
      getShellCommand(),
      ["-NoLogo", "-NoProfile", "-ExecutionPolicy", "Bypass", "-Command", command],
      {
        cwd: REPO_ROOT,
        stdio: "inherit",
      }
    );

    child.on("error", reject);
    child.on("exit", (code) => {
      if (code === 0) {
        resolve();
        return;
      }
      reject(new Error(`PowerShell command failed with exit code ${code ?? -1}`));
    });
  });
}

async function runStart(args) {
  const scriptPath = path.join(SCRIPT_ROOT, "start.ps1");
  const buildFlag = args.build ? " -Build" : "";
  const command = `& ${quotePowerShell(scriptPath)} -Stage D -WithGrafana ${toPowerShellBool(args.withGrafana)}${buildFlag}`;
  await runPowerShell(command);
}

async function runHealth(args) {
  const scriptPath = path.join(SCRIPT_ROOT, "healthcheck.ps1");
  const command = `& ${quotePowerShell(scriptPath)} -Stage D -WithGrafana ${toPowerShellBool(args.withGrafana)}`;
  await runPowerShell(command);
}

async function runSmoke(args) {
  const scriptPath = path.join(SCRIPT_ROOT, "platform-smoke.ps1");
  const command =
    `& ${quotePowerShell(scriptPath)}` +
    ` -TimeoutSec ${args.timeoutSec}` +
    ` -MinPublished ${args.minPublished}`;
  await runPowerShell(command);
}

async function main() {
  const args = parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2));

  if (args.command === "start") {
    await runStart(args);
    return;
  }
  if (args.command === "health") {
    await runHealth(args);
    return;
  }
  if (args.command === "smoke") {
    await runSmoke(args);
    return;
  }
  if (args.command === "test") {
    await runStart(args);
    await runHealth(args);
    return;
  }
  if (args.command === "e2e") {
    await runStart(args);
    await runSmoke(args);
    return;
  }

  throw new Error(`Unsupported command: ${args.command}`);
}

main().catch((error) => {
  process.stderr.write(`${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}\n`);
  process.exit(1);
});
Tool Result #390 shell_command call_zqkKSmcRBgoEzcz3OZBuwx6z exit 0 02:54:01
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: param( [int]$TimeoutSec = 240, [int]$MinPublished = 1, [switch]$SkipTriggerSeed ) $ErrorActionPreference = "Stop" $root = Split-Path ...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
param(
  [int]$TimeoutSec = 240,
  [int]$MinPublished = 1,
  [switch]$SkipTriggerSeed
)

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$root = Split-Path -Parent $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path
Set-Location $root

. "$root/_compose-common.ps1"

$envMap = Get-EnvMap -Path ".env"
$portQueryApi = Get-EnvOrDefault -EnvMap $envMap -Key "PAPAWEB_QUERY_API_PORT" -DefaultValue "18787"
$metricsUrl = "http://127.0.0.1:$portQueryApi/api/v1/metrics"
$toolsUrl = "http://127.0.0.1:$portQueryApi/api/v1/tools?limit=5"
$triggerUrl = "http://127.0.0.1:$portQueryApi/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run"

$deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($TimeoutSec)
$success = $false

Write-Host "Platform smoke check started (timeout=${TimeoutSec}s, minPublished=${MinPublished})"

if (-not $SkipTriggerSeed) {
  try {
    $payload = @{
      requestedBy = "platform-smoke"
      reason = "smoke_check"
    } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress
    $triggerResult = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $triggerUrl -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $payload -TimeoutSec 10
    Write-Host "seed trigger accepted: jobId=$($triggerResult.jobId) seedCount=$($triggerResult.seedCount)"
  } catch {
    Write-Host "seed trigger failed: $($_.Exception.Message)"
    exit 1
  }
}

while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {
  try {
    $metrics = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $metricsUrl -Method Get -TimeoutSec 8
    $published = [int]$metrics.publishedTasks
    $total = [int]$metrics.totalTasks
    Write-Host "metrics: total=$total published=$published"
    if ($published -ge $MinPublished) {
      $success = $true
      break
    }
  } catch {
    Write-Host "waiting query-api: $($_.Exception.Message)"
  }
  Start-Sleep -Seconds 5
}

if (-not $success) {
  Write-Host "Platform smoke check FAILED: publishedTasks < $MinPublished within ${TimeoutSec}s"
  exit 1
}

$tools = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $toolsUrl -Method Get -TimeoutSec 8
Write-Host "Platform smoke check PASSED"
Write-Host "Latest tools (up to 5):"
if ($tools.items) {
  foreach ($item in $tools.items) {
    Write-Host "- [$($item.id)] $($item.title) -> $($item.canonical_url)"
  }
}

exit 0
Tool Result #391 shell_command call_zrC00azOkU8IRiVo4kuNikwu exit 0 02:54:01
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: # Docker Deployment (Layered Compose) This directory now supports a layered deployment model for Plan0. The rule is: one service, one...

Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
# Docker Deployment (Layered Compose)

This directory now supports a layered deployment model for Plan0.
The rule is: one service, one container. Do not put all services in one container.

This is the common pattern used by large open-source products (including workflow/AI platforms): split web, worker, db, queue, and observability into separate containers and compose them by environment.

## Compose files

- `compose.base.yml`: PostgreSQL + Valkey + SeaweedFS
- `compose.collect.yml`: Crawlab + Pinchtab (+ Mongo for Crawlab)
- `compose.orchestrator.yml`: Airflow (init + webserver + scheduler)
- `compose.observability.yml`: Prometheus + Alertmanager (+ optional Grafana)
- `compose.platform.yml`: platform workers (`seed/fetch/normalize/quality/publish`) + query API
- `docker-compose.yml`: legacy single-file source-build entry kept for compatibility

## 1) Prepare

```powershell
cd D:\demo1\papaweb\infra\docker
Copy-Item .env.example .env -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
.\bootstrap.ps1
```

## 2) Validate compose merge

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml config -q
```

## 3) Start by stage

### Stage A: collection stack (recommended first step)

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml up -d --build
```

### Stage B: add orchestrator (Airflow)

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml -f compose.orchestrator.yml up -d --build
```

### Stage C: add observability

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml -f compose.orchestrator.yml -f compose.observability.yml up -d --build
```

### Stage D: add platform workers + query API

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml -f compose.orchestrator.yml -f compose.observability.yml -f compose.platform.yml up -d --build
```

### Optional: enable Grafana profile

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml -f compose.orchestrator.yml -f compose.observability.yml --profile grafana up -d --build
```

## One-Click Scripts (PowerShell)

```powershell
# start full stack (Stage C + Grafana)
.\start.ps1 -Stage C -WithGrafana $true -Build

# start full stack + platform workers (Stage D + Grafana)
.\start.ps1 -Stage D -WithGrafana $true -Build

# health check
.\healthcheck.ps1 -Stage D -WithGrafana $true

# smoke check (will trigger one seed run via query-api)
.\platform-smoke.ps1 -TimeoutSec 300 -MinPublished 1

# stop stack
.\stop.ps1 -Stage D -WithGrafana $true
```

Optional examples:

```powershell
# Stage A only
.\start.ps1 -Stage A -WithGrafana $false -Build
.\healthcheck.ps1 -Stage A -WithGrafana $false

# stop and remove volumes
.\stop.ps1 -Stage C -WithGrafana $true -RemoveVolumes
```

## 4) Stop

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml -f compose.orchestrator.yml -f compose.observability.yml --profile grafana down
```

## Service endpoints (default)

- Crawlab UI: `http://127.0.0.1:18080`
- Pinchtab: `http://127.0.0.1:19867`
- Airflow UI: `http://127.0.0.1:18081`
- Prometheus: `http://127.0.0.1:19090`
- Alertmanager: `http://127.0.0.1:19093`
- Grafana (optional profile): `http://127.0.0.1:13000`
- SeaweedFS filer: `http://127.0.0.1:18888`
- Query API: `http://127.0.0.1:18787`

## Airflow DAG (Stage D)

- DAG file: `services/orchestrator-airflow/dags/papaweb_platform_seed_pipeline.py`
- Runtime behavior: Airflow triggers `POST /api/v1/pipeline/seed-run` on `query-api`, then snapshots `GET /api/v1/metrics`.
- Manual trigger:
```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml -f compose.orchestrator.yml -f compose.observability.yml -f compose.platform.yml --profile grafana exec -T airflow-webserver airflow dags trigger papaweb_platform_seed_pipeline
```

## Notes

- Runtime data is stored in `infra/docker/data/`.
- Keep `docker-compose.yml` only for legacy compatibility; use layered files for all new deployments.
- `Kafka`, `OpenSearch`, `ClickHouse`, `Superset` are intentionally not in the default boot path and should be enabled by workload/RFC gates.
- Stage D validates the Plan0 minimal closed loop: `fetch -> normalize -> quality -> publish`.

assistant #394 commentary 02:54:18

现有 platform-smoke.ps1 已经覆盖了“启动 -> 触发 seed -> 等待 publish -> 查 tools”的最小链路，但还缺两块正式化内容：一是明确把 runId / tasks 查询纳入回归证据，二是补一份发布 / 回滚 Runbook。我要基于现有脚本直接收口，而不是另起一套。

docs\plan\plan0\平台级重构架构与目录方案.md:25:3. 发布写口唯一：仅 `publish_worker` 可写入 Gold 服务表。  
docs\plan\plan0\平台级重构架构与目录方案.md:75:    publish_worker/               # Gold 发布唯一写口
docs\plan\plan0\平台级重构架构与目录方案.md:99:    policies/                     # 质量阈值、发布策略版本
docs\plan\plan0\平台级重构架构与目录方案.md:121:3. `services/worker-*`：每类 Worker 单一职责，输入输出走统一 `contracts`，发布路径统一命名为 `publish_worker`。  
docs\plan\plan0\平台级采集与分析架构方案（开源可商用版）.md:67:5. Gold 发布依赖 `publish_worker`，不得由脚本或 ad-hoc SQL 直接写入生产服务表。  
docs\plan\plan0\平台级采集与分析架构方案（开源可商用版）.md:143:> 备注：涉及 AGPL 的组件（如 Grafana）需结合你们的分发模式和法务策略评估。`MinIO` 仅作为历史存量兼容对象，其维护状态、许可证与发布节奏需在选型评审时复核。
docs\plan\plan0\平台级采集与分析架构方案（开源可商用版）.md:173:4. 上线 `publish_worker`，打通质量门槛到发布门槛的自动化链路。  
docs\plan\plan0\平台级采集与分析架构方案（开源可商用版）.md:189:发布判定：
docs\plan\plan0\平台级采集与分析架构方案（开源可商用版）.md:190:1. `publish_worker` 必须同时满足 3 个阈值才可发布。  
docs\plan\plan0\平台级采集与分析架构方案（开源可商用版）.md:191:2. 连续 `60` 分钟发布通过率 `< 70%` 或重复发布率 `> 1%` 时，自动触发降级与告警。  
docs\plan\plan0\平台级采集与分析架构方案（开源可商用版）.md:267:3. 质量达标率：发布数据满足默认阈值。  
docs\plan\plan0\平台级采集与分析架构方案（开源可商用版）.md:289:种子策略只影响候选 URL 生成与刷新，不改变统一任务模型与发布门槛。
docs\plan\plan0\平台级采集与分析架构方案（开源可商用版）.md:311:   `Airflow` 单编排真源、`publish_worker` 单发布写口、Worker 不直写 `ClickHouse`。
docs\plan\plan0\平台级采集与分析架构方案（开源可商用版）.md:325:3. 先把质量门禁前置到发布：覆盖率/置信度/新鲜度不达标不发布。  
docs\plan\plan0\平台化升级步骤与主流最佳实践对齐文档（讨论稿）.md:62:4. 发布边界：仅 `publish_worker` 允许写 Gold 发布面。

We perform manual acceptance and smoke testing internally for new features by deploying to our internal observability stack. shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.6 seconds Output: param( [ValidateSet("A", "B", "C", "D")] [string]$Stage = "C", [bool]$WithGrafana = $true ) $ErrorActionPreference = "Stop" $root = S...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.6 seconds
Output:
param(
  [ValidateSet("A", "B", "C", "D")]
  [string]$Stage = "C",
  [bool]$WithGrafana = $true
)

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$root = Split-Path -Parent $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path
Set-Location $root

. "$root/_compose-common.ps1"

function Test-HttpEndpoint {
  param(
    [string]$Name,
    [string]$Url,
    [int]$Retries = 3,
    [int]$DelaySec = 2
  )

  for ($attempt = 1; $attempt -le $Retries; $attempt++) {
    try {
      $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $Url -Method Get -TimeoutSec 8
      if ($res.StatusCode -ge 200 -and $res.StatusCode -lt 400) {
        Write-Host "[OK] HTTP $Name -> $Url ($($res.StatusCode))"
        return $true
      }
      Write-Host "[WARN] HTTP $Name attempt=$attempt/$Retries -> status=$($res.StatusCode)"
    } catch {
      Write-Host "[WARN] HTTP $Name attempt=$attempt/$Retries -> $($_.Exception.Message)"
    }

    if ($attempt -lt $Retries) {
      Start-Sleep -Seconds $DelaySec
    }
  }

  Write-Host "[FAIL] HTTP $Name -> $Url"
  return $false
}

function Test-ServiceState {
  param(
    [string]$Service,
    [bool]$RequireHealthy = $false
  )
  $id = docker compose @composeArgs ps -q $Service | Select-Object -First 1
  $id = if ($null -eq $id) { "" } else { "$id".Trim() }
  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($id)) {
    Write-Host "[FAIL] Service $Service not found"
    return $false
  }

  $state = (docker inspect --format '{{.State.Status}}' $id).Trim()
  if ($state -ne "running") {
    Write-Host "[FAIL] Service $Service state=$state"
    return $false
  }

  if ($RequireHealthy) {
    $health = (docker inspect --format '{{if .State.Health}}{{.State.Health.Status}}{{else}}none{{end}}' $id).Trim()
    if ($health -ne "healthy") {
      Write-Host "[FAIL] Service $Service health=$health"
      return $false
    }
  }

  Write-Host "[OK] Service $Service running"
  return $true
}

$composeArgs = Get-ComposeArgs -Stage $Stage -WithGrafana $WithGrafana
docker compose @composeArgs config -q
if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
  throw "docker compose config validation failed with exit code $LASTEXITCODE"
}

Write-Host "Healthcheck stage: $Stage (WithGrafana=$WithGrafana)"
docker compose @composeArgs ps
if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
  throw "docker compose ps failed with exit code $LASTEXITCODE"
}

$envMap = Get-EnvMap -Path ".env"

$portCrawlab = Get-EnvOrDefault -EnvMap $envMap -Key "CRAWLAB_PORT" -DefaultValue "18080"
$portPinchtab = Get-EnvOrDefault -EnvMap $envMap -Key "PINCHTAB_PORT" -DefaultValue "19867"
$pinchtabToken = Get-EnvOrDefault -EnvMap $envMap -Key "PINCHTAB_TOKEN" -DefaultValue "papaweb-local-token"
$portSeaweedfsFiler = Get-EnvOrDefault -EnvMap $envMap -Key "SEAWEEDFS_FILER_PORT" -DefaultValue "18888"
$portAirflow = Get-EnvOrDefault -EnvMap $envMap -Key "AIRFLOW_WEB_PORT" -DefaultValue "18081"
$portPrometheus = Get-EnvOrDefault -EnvMap $envMap -Key "PROMETHEUS_PORT" -DefaultValue "19090"
$portAlertmanager = Get-EnvOrDefault -EnvMap $envMap -Key "ALERTMANAGER_PORT" -DefaultValue "19093"
$portGrafana = Get-EnvOrDefault -EnvMap $envMap -Key "GRAFANA_PORT" -DefaultValue "13000"
$portQueryApi = Get-EnvOrDefault -EnvMap $envMap -Key "PAPAWEB_QUERY_API_PORT" -DefaultValue "18787"

$serviceChecks = @(
  @{ name = "postgres"; healthy = $true },
  @{ name = "valkey"; healthy = $true },
  @{ name = "seaweedfs-master"; healthy = $false },
  @{ name = "seaweedfs-volume"; healthy = $false },
  @{ name = "seaweedfs-filer"; healthy = $false },
  @{ name = "crawlab-mongo"; healthy = $false },
  @{ name = "crawlab-master"; healthy = $false },
  @{ name = "pinchtab"; healthy = $true }
)

if ($Stage -in @("B", "C", "D")) {
  $serviceChecks += @(
    @{ name = "airflow-webserver"; healthy = $false },
    @{ name = "airflow-scheduler"; healthy = $false }
  )
}
if ($Stage -in @("C", "D")) {
  $serviceChecks += @(
    @{ name = "prometheus"; healthy = $false },
    @{ name = "alertmanager"; healthy = $false }
  )
  if ($WithGrafana) {
    $serviceChecks += @{ name = "grafana"; healthy = $false }
  }
}
if ($Stage -eq "D") {
  $serviceChecks += @(
    @{ name = "worker-discovery"; healthy = $false },
    @{ name = "worker-seed"; healthy = $false },
    @{ name = "worker-fetch-http"; healthy = $false },
    @{ name = "worker-normalize"; healthy = $false },
    @{ name = "worker-quality"; healthy = $false },
    @{ name = "publish_worker"; healthy = $false },
    @{ name = "query-api"; healthy = $true }
  )
}

$ok = $true
foreach ($s in $serviceChecks) {
  if (-not (Test-ServiceState -Service $s.name -RequireHealthy $s.healthy)) {
    $ok = $false
  }
}

if ($Stage -in @("B", "C", "D")) {
  $airflowInitId = docker compose @composeArgs ps -a -q airflow-init | Select-Object -First 1
  $airflowInitId = if ($null -eq $airflowInitId) { "" } else { "$airflowInitId".Trim() }
  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($airflowInitId)) {
    Write-Host "[FAIL] airflow-init container not found"
    $ok = $false
  } else {
    $initExit = (docker inspect --format '{{.State.ExitCode}}' $airflowInitId).Trim()
    if ($initExit -ne "0") {
      Write-Host "[FAIL] airflow-init exit code=$initExit"
      $ok = $false
    } else {
      Write-Host "[OK] airflow-init exit code=0"
    }
  }
}

if (-not (Test-HttpEndpoint -Name "Crawlab" -Url "http://127.0.0.1:$portCrawlab" -Retries 4 -DelaySec 2)) { $ok = $false }
if (-not (Test-HttpEndpoint -Name "Pinchtab health" -Url "http://127.0.0.1:$portPinchtab/health?token=$pinchtabToken" -Retries 4 -DelaySec 2)) { $ok = $false }
if (-not (Test-HttpEndpoint -Name "SeaweedFS filer" -Url "http://127.0.0.1:$portSeaweedfsFiler" -Retries 4 -DelaySec 2)) { $ok = $false }

if ($Stage -in @("B", "C", "D")) {
  if (-not (Test-HttpEndpoint -Name "Airflow health" -Url "http://127.0.0.1:$portAirflow/health" -Retries 8 -DelaySec 3)) { $ok = $false }
}
if ($Stage -in @("C", "D")) {
  if (-not (Test-HttpEndpoint -Name "Prometheus ready" -Url "http://127.0.0.1:$portPrometheus/-/ready" -Retries 4 -DelaySec 2)) { $ok = $false }
  if (-not (Test-HttpEndpoint -Name "Alertmanager ready" -Url "http://127.0.0.1:$portAlertmanager/-/ready" -Retries 4 -DelaySec 2)) { $ok = $false }
  if ($WithGrafana) {
    if (-not (Test-HttpEndpoint -Name "Grafana health" -Url "http://127.0.0.1:$portGrafana/api/health" -Retries 4 -DelaySec 2)) { $ok = $false }
  }
}
if ($Stage -eq "D") {
  if (-not (Test-HttpEndpoint -Name "Query API health" -Url "http://127.0.0.1:$portQueryApi/healthz" -Retries 8 -DelaySec 2)) { $ok = $false }
  if (-not (Test-HttpEndpoint -Name "Query API metrics" -Url "http://127.0.0.1:$portQueryApi/api/v1/metrics" -Retries 8 -DelaySec 2)) { $ok = $false }
}

if ($ok) {
  Write-Host "Healthcheck PASSED"
  exit 0
}

Write-Host "Healthcheck FAILED"
exit 1
